21	class AdminRentalService(BaseService):
22	    """Service for admin rental issue management"""
23	    
24	    def get_rental_issues(
25	        self,
26	        status: str = None,
27	        issue_type: str = None,
28	        search: str = None,
29	        ordering: str = '-reported_at'
30	    ):
31	        """
32	        Get list of rental issues with filtering
33	        
34	        Args:
35	            status: Filter by status (REPORTED, RESOLVED)
36	            issue_type: Filter by issue type
37	            search: Search in description or rental code
38	            ordering: Order by field
39	            
40	        Returns:
41	            Queryset of rental issues
42	        """
43	        queryset = RentalIssue.objects.select_related(
44	            'rental__user',
45	            'rental__power_bank',
46	            'rental__station',
47	            'rental__return_station'
48	        )
49	        
50	        # Apply filters
51	        if status:
52	            queryset = queryset.filter(status=status)
53	        
54	        if issue_type:
55	            queryset = queryset.filter(issue_type=issue_type)
56	        
57	        if search:
58	            from django.db.models import Q
59	            queryset = queryset.filter(
60	                Q(description__icontains=search) |
61	                Q(rental__rental_code__icontains=search)
62	            )
63	        
64	        # Apply ordering
65	        queryset = queryset.order_by(ordering)
66	        
67	        return queryset
68	    
69	    def get_rental_issue(self, issue_id: str) -> RentalIssue:
70	        """
71	        Get specific rental issue by ID
72	        
73	        Args:
74	            issue_id: Issue ID
75	            
76	        Returns:
77	            RentalIssue instance
78	            
79	        Raises:
80	            ServiceException: If issue not found
81	        """
82	        try:
83	            return RentalIssue.objects.select_related(
84	                'rental__user',
85	                'rental__power_bank',
86	                'rental__station',
87	                'rental__return_station'
88	            ).get(id=issue_id)
89	        except RentalIssue.DoesNotExist:
90	            raise ServiceException(
91	                detail="Rental issue not found",
92	                code="rental_issue_not_found"
93	            )
94	    
95	    @transaction.atomic
96	    def update_rental_issue_status(
97	        self,
98	        issue_id: str,
99	        status: str,
100	        admin_user: User,
101	        notes: str = None,
102	        request=None
103	    ) -> RentalIssue:
104	        """
105	        Update rental issue status
106	        
107	        Args:
108	            issue_id: Issue ID
109	            status: New status (REPORTED, RESOLVED)
110	            admin_user: Admin user making the update
111	            notes: Optional admin notes
112	            request: HTTP request for audit logging
113	            
114	        Returns:
115	            Updated RentalIssue instance
116	            
117	        Raises:
118	            ServiceException: If validation fails
119	        """
120	        issue = self.get_rental_issue(issue_id)
121	        
122	        # Validate status
123	        valid_statuses = ['REPORTED', 'RESOLVED']
124	        if status not in valid_statuses:
125	            raise ServiceException(
126	                detail=f"Invalid status. Must be one of: {', '.join(valid_statuses)}",
127	                code="invalid_status"
128	            )
129	        
130	        # Update status
131	        old_status = issue.status
132	        issue.status = status
133	        
134	        # Set resolved_at if resolved
135	        if status == 'RESOLVED' and old_status != 'RESOLVED':
136	            issue.resolved_at = timezone.now()
137	        
138	        issue.save(update_fields=['status', 'resolved_at', 'updated_at'])
139	        
140	        # Log admin action
141	        self._log_admin_action(
142	            admin_user=admin_user,
143	            action_type='UPDATE_RENTAL_ISSUE_STATUS',
144	            target_model='RentalIssue',
145	            target_id=str(issue.id),
146	            changes={
147	                'old_status': old_status,
148	                'new_status': status,
149	                'rental_code': issue.rental.rental_code,
150	                'notes': notes
151	            },
152	            description=f"Updated rental issue {issue.id} status from {old_status} to {status}",
153	            request=request
154	        )
155	        
156	        self.log_info(f"Rental issue {issue.id} status updated: {old_status} -> {status}")
157	        
158	        # Send notification to user if resolved
159	        if status == 'RESOLVED':
160	            self._send_issue_resolved_notification(issue)
161	        
162	        return issue
163	    
164	    @transaction.atomic
165	    def delete_rental_issue(
166	        self,
167	        issue_id: str,
168	        admin_user: User,
169	        request=None
170	    ) -> Dict[str, str]:
171	        """
172	        Delete rental issue (soft delete by marking as resolved)
173	        
174	        Args:
175	            issue_id: Issue ID
176	            admin_user: Admin user making the deletion
177	            request: HTTP request for audit logging
178	            
179	        Returns:
180	            Success message dict
181	            
182	        Raises:
183	            ServiceException: If validation fails
184	        """
185	        issue = self.get_rental_issue(issue_id)
186	        
187	        # Soft delete by marking as resolved
188	        if issue.status != 'RESOLVED':
189	            issue.status = 'RESOLVED'
190	            issue.resolved_at = timezone.now()
191	            issue.save(update_fields=['status', 'resolved_at', 'updated_at'])
192	        
193	        # Log admin action
194	        self._log_admin_action(
195	            admin_user=admin_user,
196	            action_type='DELETE_RENTAL_ISSUE',
197	            target_model='RentalIssue',
198	            target_id=str(issue.id),
199	            changes={
200	                'rental_code': issue.rental.rental_code,
201	                'issue_type': issue.issue_type
202	            },
203	            description=f"Deleted rental issue {issue.id}",
204	            request=request
205	        )
206	        
207	        self.log_info(f"Rental issue {issue.id} deleted")
208	        
209	        return {"message": "Rental issue deleted successfully"}
210	    
211	    def _send_issue_resolved_notification(self, issue: RentalIssue):
212	        """Send notification to user when issue is resolved"""
213	        try:
214	            from api.user.notifications.services import notify
215	            
216	            notify(
217	                issue.rental.user,
218	                'rental_issue_resolved',
219	                rental_code=issue.rental.rental_code,
220	                issue_type=issue.issue_type,
221	                rental_id=str(issue.rental.id),
222	                issue_id=str(issue.id)
223	            )
224	        except Exception as e:
225	            self.log_warning(f"Failed to send issue resolved notification: {str(e)}")
226	    
227	    def _log_admin_action(
228	        self,
229	        admin_user: User,
230	        action_type: str,
231	        target_model: str,
232	        target_id: str,
233	        changes: dict,
234	        description: str,
235	        request=None
236	    ):
237	        """Log admin action to audit trail"""
238	        try:
239	            from api.admin.models import AdminActionLog
240	            
241	            AdminActionLog.objects.create(
242	                admin_user=admin_user,
243	                action_type=action_type,
244	                target_model=target_model,
245	                target_id=target_id,
246	                changes=changes,
247	                description=description,
248	                ip_address=self._get_client_ip(request) if request else '',
249	                user_agent=request.META.get('HTTP_USER_AGENT', '') if request else ''
250	            )
251	        except Exception as e:
252	            self.log_error(f"Failed to log admin action: {str(e)}")
253	    
254	    def _get_client_ip(self, request) -> str:
255	        """Get client IP address from request"""
256	        x_forwarded_for = request.META.get('HTTP_X_FORWARDED_FOR')
257	        if x_forwarded_for:
258	            ip = x_forwarded_for.split(',')[0]
259	        else:
260	            ip = request.META.get('REMOTE_ADDR')
261	        return ip
262	    
263	    # ============================================================
264	    # Rental List Methods
265	    # ============================================================
266	    
267	    def get_rentals_list(self, filters: Dict[str, Any] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
268	        """
269	        Get paginated list of rentals with filters
270	        
271	        Args:
272	            filters: Dictionary containing filter parameters
273	                - status: Filter by rental status
274	                - payment_status: Filter by payment status
275	                - user_id: Filter by user ID
276	                - station_id: Filter by station ID
277	                - search: Search by rental code or user name
278	                - recent: 'today', '24h', '7d', '30d' for recent rentals
279	                - start_date: Filter rentals started after this date
280	                - end_date: Filter rentals started before this date
281	                - page: Page number (default: 1)
282	                - page_size: Items per page (default: 20)
283	                
284	        Returns:
285	            Dict with results and pagination info
286	        """
287	        from api.common.utils.helpers import paginate_queryset
288	        from datetime import timedelta
289	        from django.db.models import Q
290	        
291	        queryset = self._get_base_rental_queryset()
292	        
293	        if filters:
294	            # Status filter
295	            if filters.get('status'):
296	                queryset = queryset.filter(status=filters['status'])
297	            
298	            # Payment status filter
299	            if filters.get('payment_status'):
300	                queryset = queryset.filter(payment_status=filters['payment_status'])
301	            
302	            # User filter
303	            if filters.get('user_id'):
304	                queryset = queryset.filter(user_id=filters['user_id'])
305	            
306	            # Station filter
307	            if filters.get('station_id'):
308	                queryset = queryset.filter(
309	                    Q(station_id=filters['station_id']) | 
310	                    Q(return_station_id=filters['station_id'])
311	                )
312	            
313	            # Search filter
314	            if filters.get('search'):
315	                search_term = filters['search']
316	                queryset = queryset.filter(
317	                    Q(rental_code__icontains=search_term) |
318	                    Q(user__username__icontains=search_term) |
319	                    Q(user__phone_number__icontains=search_term)
320	                )
321	            
322	            # Recent rentals filter
323	            if filters.get('recent'):
324	                now = timezone.now()
325	                recent_type = filters['recent']
326	                
327	                if recent_type == 'today':
328	                    queryset = queryset.filter(
329	                        created_at__date=now.date()
330	                    )
331	                elif recent_type == '24h':
332	                    queryset = queryset.filter(
333	                        created_at__gte=now - timedelta(hours=24)
334	                    )
335	                elif recent_type == '7d':
336	                    queryset = queryset.filter(
337	                        created_at__gte=now - timedelta(days=7)
338	                    )
339	                elif recent_type == '30d':
340	                    queryset = queryset.filter(
341	                        created_at__gte=now - timedelta(days=30)
342	                    )
343	            
344	            # Date range filters
345	            if filters.get('start_date'):
346	                queryset = queryset.filter(started_at__gte=filters['start_date'])
347	            
348	            if filters.get('end_date'):
349	                queryset = queryset.filter(started_at__lte=filters['end_date'])
350	        
351	        # Order by latest first
352	        queryset = queryset.order_by('-created_at')
353	        
354	        # Pagination
355	        page = filters.get('page', 1) if filters else 1
356	        page_size = filters.get('page_size', 20) if filters else 20
357	        
358	        return paginate_queryset(queryset, page, page_size)
359	    
360	    def get_rental_detail(self, rental_id: str):
361	        """
362	        Get detailed rental information
363	        
364	        Args:
365	            rental_id: Rental ID (UUID)
366	            
367	        Returns:
368	            Rental instance with all related data
369	            
370	        Raises:
371	            ServiceException: If rental not found
372	        """
373	        from api.user.rentals.models import Rental
374	        
375	        try:
376	            return self._get_base_rental_queryset().get(id=rental_id)
377	        except Rental.DoesNotExist:
378	            raise ServiceException(
379	                detail="Rental not found",
380	                code="rental_not_found"
381	            )
382	    
383	    def _get_base_rental_queryset(self):
384	        """Get base queryset with all necessary relationships"""
385	        from api.user.rentals.models import Rental
386	        
387	        return Rental.objects.select_related(
388	            'user',
389	            'station',
390	            'return_station',
391	            'slot',
392	            'package',
393	            'power_bank'
394	        ).prefetch_related(
395	            'extensions',
396	            'issues'
397	        )

        'return_slot': return_slot.slot_number if return_slot else None,\n+                'manual_return_override': True,\n+            },\n+            description=f\"Force completed rental {rental.rental_code}\",\n+            request=request\n+        )\n+\n+        self.log_info(\n+            f\"Rental force-completed by admin {admin_user.id}: {rental.rental_code}\"\n+        )\n+        return self._build_force_complete_result(rental, already_completed=False)\n+\n+    def _get_rental_service(self):\n+        from api.user.rentals.services import RentalService\n+        return RentalService()\n+\n+    def _resolve_known_return_location(self, rental: Rental) -> Tuple[Optional[Any], Optional[Any]]:\n+        power_bank = rental.power_bank\n+        if not power_bank:\n+            return None, None\n+\n+        return_station = power_bank.current_station\n+        return_slot = power_bank.current_slot\n+\n+        if return_station and return_slot and return_slot.station_id == return_station.id:\n+            return return_station, return_slot\n+\n+        return None, None\n+\n+    def _update_returned_powerbank_state(self, rental: Rental, return_station, return_slot) -> None:\n+        # Release pickup slot only when return was recorded to a different slot or unknown location.\n+        if rental.slot and (not return_slot or rental.slot_id != return_slot.id):\n+            rental.slot.status = 'AVAILABLE'\n+            rental.slot.current_rental = None\n+            rental.slot.save(update_fields=['status', 'current_rental', 'last_updated'])\n+\n+        if rental.power_bank:\n+            rental.power_bank.status = 'AVAILABLE'\n+            if return_station and return_slot:\n+                rental.power_bank.current_station = return_station\n+                rental.power_bank.current_slot = return_slot\n+            rental.power_bank.save(update_fields=['status', 'current_station', 'current_slot', 'last_updated'])\n+\n+        if return_slot:\n+            return_slot.status = 'OCCUPIED'\n+            return_slot.current_rental = None\n+            return_slot.save(update_fields=['status', 'current_rental', 'last_updated'])\n+\n+    def _run_force_completion_side_effects(self, rental: Rental, rental_service) -> None:\n+        try:\n+            rental_service._award_completion_points(rental)\n+        except Exception as exc:\n+            self.log_warning(f\"Failed to award points for force-completed rental {rental.rental_code}: {exc}\")\n+\n+        try:\n+            rental_service._send_completion_notification(rental)\n+        except Exception as exc:\n+            self.log_warning(\n+                f\"Failed to send completion notification for force-completed rental {rental.rental_code}: {exc}\"\n+            )\n+\n+        due_amount = rental.overdue_amount\n+        if rental.package.payment_model == 'POSTPAID':\n+            due_amount = rental.amount_paid + rental.overdue_amount\n+\n+        if due_amount > Decimal('0'):\n+            try:\n+                rental_service._notify_payment_required(rental, due_amount, Decimal('0'))\n+            except Exception as exc:\n+                self.log_warning(f\"Failed to send payment-due notification for rental {rental.rental_code}: {exc}\")\n+\n+    def _build_force_complete_result(self, rental: Rental, already_completed: bool) -> Dict[str, Any]:\n+        return {\n+            'rental_id': str(rental.id),\n+            'rental_code': rental.rental_code,\n+            'status': rental.status,\n+            'payment_status': rental.payment_status,\n+            'ended_at': rental.ended_at.isoformat() if rental.ended_at else None,\n+            'return_station_serial': rental.return_station.serial_number if rental.return_station else None,\n+            'already_completed': already_completed,\n+            'manual_return_override': bool((rental.rental_metadata or {}).get('manual_return_override')),\n+        }\n*** End Patch\n"}

109	
110	function formatMetadataValue(value: unknown): string {
111	  if (value === null || value === undefined || value === "")
112	    return "â€”";
113	  if (typeof value === "boolean") return value ? "Yes" : "No";
114	  if (typeof value === "object") return JSON.stringify(value);
115	  return String(value);
116	}
117	
118	export default function RentalDetailPage({
119	  params,
120	}: {
121	  params: Promise<{ rental_id: string }>;
122	}) {
123	  const router = useRouter();
124	  const { rental_id } = use(params);
125	  const [rental, setRental] = useState<RentalDetail | null>(null);
126	  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
127	  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
128	
129	  useEffect(() => {
130	    fetchRentalDetail();
131	  }, [rental_id]);
132	
133	  const fetchRentalDetail = async () => {
134	    try {
135	      setLoading(true);
136	      const token = localStorage.getItem("accessToken");
137	      const response = await fetch(`/api/admin/rentals/${rental_id}`, {
138	        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
139	      });
140	      const data = await response.json();
141	      if (data.success) {
142	        setRental(data.data);
143	      } else {
144	        setError(data.message || "Failed to load rental details");
145	        toast.error("Failed to load rental details");
146	      }
147	    } catch {
148	      setError("Failed to load rental details");
149	      toast.error("Failed to load rental details");
150	    } finally {
151	      setLoading(false);
152	    }
153	  };
154	
155	  const handleJumpToSection = (sectionId: string) => {
156	    document.getElementById(sectionId)?.scrollIntoView({
157	      behavior: "smooth",
158	      block: "start",
159	    });
160	  };
161	
162	  const metadataEntries = useMemo(() => {
163	    if (!rental?.rental_metadata) return [];
164	    return Object.entries(rental.rental_metadata).filter(
165	      ([, v]) => v !== null && v !== undefined && v !== "",
166	    );
167	  }, [rental]);
168	
169	  const overdueValue = parseFloat(rental?.overdue_amount || "0");
170	  const paidValue = parseFloat(rental?.amount_paid || "0");
171	  const totalValue = paidValue + overdueValue;
172	
173	  if (loading) {
174	    return (
175	      <div className="p-4 sm:p-5 lg:p-8 max-w-[1440px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#0b0b0b]">
176	        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh] gap-4">
177	          <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-sm border-[3px] border-surface-raised border-t-accent animate-spin" />
178	          <p className="text-text-secondary text-sm">
179	            Loading rental details...
180	          </p>
181	        </div>
182	      </div>
183	    );
184	  }
185	
186	  if (error || !rental) {
187	    return (
188	      <div className="p-4 sm:p-5 lg:p-8 max-w-[1440px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#0b0b0b]">
189	        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh] gap-4 text-center px-4">
190	          <FiXCircle className="text-5xl text-danger" />
191	          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-text-primary">
192	            Error Loading Rental
193	          </h2>
194	          <p className="text-sm text-text-secondary max-w-xs">
195	            {error || "Rental not found"}
196	          </p>
197	          <button
198	            onClick={() => router.back()}
199	            className="btn-primary mt-1"
200	            type="button"
201	          >
202	            Go Back
203	          </button>
204	        </div>
205	      </div>
206	    );
207	  }
208	
209	  return (
210	    <main className="p-4 sm:p-5 lg:p-8 max-w-[1440px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#0b0b0b] space-y-5 lg:space-y-6 overflow-x-hidden">
211	      {/* â”€â”€â”€ Back â”€â”€â”€ */}
212	      <button
213	        className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-accent p-2 px-3 rounded-md hover:bg-accent/10 transition-colors"
214	        onClick={() => router.back()}
215	        type="button"
216	      >
217	        <FiArrowLeft className="text-sm shrink-0" />
218	        <span className="truncate">Back to Rentals</span>
219	      </button>
220	
221	      {/* â”€â”€â”€ Header â”€â”€â”€ */}
222	      <header className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-start md:justify-between gap-4 min-w-0">
223	        <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
224	          <h1 className="text-xl sm:text-2xl md:text-[28px] font-bold text-text-primary leading-tight break-words font-mono">
225	            {rental.rental_code}
226	          </h1>
227	          <p className="text-[13px] sm:text-sm md:text-[15px] text-text-secondary mt-2 flex items-center gap-1.5 flex-wrap min-w-0">
228	            <FiUser className="text-sm shrink-0" />
229	            <span className="break-words min-w-0">
230	              {rental.user.username || rental.user.email}
231	            </span>
232	            {rental.station?.station_name && (
233	              <>
234	                <span className="shrink-0">Â·</span>
235	                <span className="break-words min-w-0">
236	                  Picked up from {rental.station.station_name}
237	                </span>
238	              </>
239	            )}
240	          </p>
241	        </div>
242	
243	        <div className="flex gap-2 items-center shrink-0 w-full md:w-auto md:flex-wrap md:justify-end">
244	          <button
245	            type="button"
246	            className="flex-1 sm:flex-none inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 px-3.5 py-2 bg-surface-raised border border-border-subtle rounded-lg text-text-primary text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-surface-hover hover:border-accent hover:text-accent hover:-translate-y-px transition-all whitespace-nowrap"
247	            onClick={() =>
248	              handleJumpToSection("rental-payment-summary")
249	            }
250	          >
251	            <FiDollarSign className="text-sm shrink-0" />
252	            <span className="truncate">Payment</span>
253	          </button>
254	          <button
255	            type="button"
256	            className="flex-1 sm:flex-none inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 px-3.5 py-2 bg-surface-raised border border-border-subtle rounded-lg text-text-primary text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-surface-hover hover:border-accent hover:text-accent hover:-translate-y-px transition-all whitespace-nowrap"
257	            onClick={() =>
258	              handleJumpToSection("rental-timeline-section")
259	            }
260	          >
261	            <FiClock className="text-sm shrink-0" />
262	            <span className="truncate">Timeline</span>
263	          </button>
264	          <button
265	            type="button"
266	            className="flex-1 sm:flex-none inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 px-3.5 py-2 bg-surface-raised border border-border-subtle rounded-lg text-text-primary text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-surface-hover hover:border-accent hover:text-accent hover:-translate-y-px transition-all whitespace-nowrap"
267	            onClick={() =>
268	              handleJumpToSection("rental-additional-info")
269	            }
270	          >
271	            <FiInfo className="text-sm shrink-0" />
272	            <span className="truncate">More Info</span>
273	          </button>
274	        </div>
275	      </header>
276	
277	      {/* â”€â”€â”€ Status Bar â”€â”€â”€ */}
278	      <section className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row lg:items-stretch px-3 sm:px-4 md:px-6 py-4 md:py-[18px] bg-surface rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden">
279	        <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 lg:flex-row lg:gap-[18px] lg:flex-[0_1_400px] lg:min-w-0 lg:items-center min-w-0">
280	          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5 min-w-0">
281	            <span className="text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] font-semibold text-text-muted uppercase tracking-wide">
282	              Rental Status
283	            </span>
284	            <span
285	              className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold w-fit border ${
286	                statusStyles[rental.status] || defaultBadgeStyle
287	              }`}
288	            >
289	              <FiActivity className="text-xs shrink-0" />
290	              <span className="break-words">
291	                {rental.status.replace(/_/g, " ")}
292	              </span>
293	            </span>
294	          </div>
295	
296	          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5 min-w-0">
297	            <span className="text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] font-semibold text-text-muted uppercase tracking-wide">
298	              Payment
299	            </span>
300	            <span
301	              className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold w-fit border ${
302	                paymentStyles[rental.payment_status] || defaultBadgeStyle
303	              }`}
304	            >
305	              <FiDollarSign className="text-xs shrink-0" />
306	              <span className="break-words">
307	                {rental.payment_status.replace(/_/g, " ")}
308	              </span>
309	            </span>
310	          </div>
311	
312	          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5 min-w-0">
313	            <span className="text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] font-semibold text-text-muted uppercase tracking-wide">
314	              Returned On Time
315	            </span>
316	            <span
317	              className={`text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold ${
318	                rental.is_returned_on_time
319	                  ? "text-[#47b216]"
320	                  : "text-[#dc3545]"
321	              }`}
322	            >
323	              {rental.is_returned_on_time ? "Yes" : "No"}
324	            </span>
325	          </div>
326	        </div>
327	
328	        <div className="w-full h-px lg:w-px lg:h-auto lg:min-h-10 bg-border-subtle my-3 lg:my-0 lg:mx-[18px] shrink-0" />
329	
330	        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 flex-1 min-w-0 content-start lg:items-center">
331	          <button
332	            onClick={() =>
333	              handleJumpToSection("rental-payment-summary")
334	            }
335	            className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold border bg-accent/15 border-accent/40 text-accent transition-all hover:bg-accent/25 whitespace-nowrap"
336	            type="button"
337	          >
338	            <FiDollarSign className="text-xs shrink-0" />
339	            Paid {formatAmount(rental.amount_paid)}
340	          </button>
341	          <button
342	            onClick={() =>
343	              handleJumpToSection("rental-timeline-section")
344	            }
345	            className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold border bg-surface-raised border-border-subtle text-text-secondary hover:bg-surface-hover hover:text-white transition-all whitespace-nowrap"
346	            type="button"
347	          >
348	            <FiCalendar className="text-xs shrink-0" />
349	            Due {formatDateTime(rental.due_at)}
350	          </button>
351	          <button
352	            onClick={() =>
353	              handleJumpToSection("rental-stations-section")
354	            }
355	            className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold border bg-surface-raised border-border-subtle text-text-secondary hover:bg-surface-hover hover:text-white transition-all whitespace-nowrap"
356	            type="button"
357	          >
358	            <FiMapPin className="text-xs shrink-0" />
359	            Slot #{rental.slot_number}
360	          </button>
361	          <button
362	            onClick={() =>
363	              handleJumpToSection("rental-additional-info")
364	            }
365	            className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold border bg-surface-raised border-border-subtle text-text-secondary hover:bg-surface-hover hover:text-white transition-all whitespace-nowrap"
366	            type="button"
367	          >
368	            <FiInfo className="text-xs shrink-0" />
369	            {rental.issues_count} Issue
370	            {rental.issues_count === 1 ? "" : "s"}
371	          </button>
372	        </div>
373	      </section>
374	
375	      {/* â”€â”€â”€ Data Grid â”€â”€â”€ */}
376	      <section className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4 bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
377	        {/* Rental Details */}
378	        <div className="p-4 sm:p-[22px_24px] border-b border-border md:border-b-0 md:border-r last:border-b-0 last:border-r-0 min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
379	          <h3 className="text-[11px] font-bold text-accent uppercase tracking-wider mb-3 sm:mb-4 pb-2 sm:pb-2.5 border-b border-border">
380	            Rental Details
381	          </h3>
382	          <div className="flex flex-col gap-px">
383	            <InfoRow label="Rental ID" value={rental.id} mono breakAll />
384	            <InfoRow
385	              label="Rental Code"
386	              value={rental.rental_code}
387	              mono
388	            />
389	            <InfoRow
390	              label="Status"
391	              value={
392	                <span
393	                  className={`inline-flex px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-[11px] font-semibold border ${
394	                    statusStyles[rental.status] ||
395	                    defaultBadgeStyle
396	                  }`}
397	                >
398	                  {rental.status.replace(/_/g, " ")}
399	                </span>
400	              }
401	            />
402	            <InfoRow
403	              label="Payment"
404	              value={
405	                <span
406	                  className={`inline-flex px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-[11px] font-semibold border ${
407	                    paymentStyles[rental.payment_status] ||
408	                    defaultBadgeStyle
409	                  }`}
410	                >
411	                  {rental.payment_status.replace(/_/g, " ")}
412	                </span>
413	              }
414	            />
415	            <InfoRow
416	              label="Slot Number"
417	              value={`#${rental.slot_number}`}
418	              highlight
419	            />
420	            <InfoRow label="Extensions" value={String(rental.extensions_count)} />
421	            <InfoRow label="Issues" value={String(rental.issues_count)} />
422	            <InfoRow
423	              label="On-Time Return"
424	              value={rental.is_returned_on_time ? "Yes" : "No"}
425	            />
426	            <InfoRow
427	              label="Bonus Awarded"
428	              value={rental.timely_return_bonus_awarded ? "Yes" : "No"}
429	            />
430	          </div>
431	        </div>
432	
433	        {/* User & Package */}
434	        <div className="p-4 sm:p-[22px_24px] border-b border-border md:border-b-0 md:border-r last:border-b-0 last:border-r-0 min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
435	          <h3 className="text-[11px] font-bold text-accent uppercase tracking-wider mb-3 sm:mb-4 pb-2 sm:pb-2.5 border-b border-border">
436	            User &amp; Package
437	          </h3>
438	          <div className="flex flex-col gap-px">
439	            <InfoRow label="User ID" value={`#${rental.user.id}`} />
440	            <InfoRow
441	              label="Username"
442	              value={rental.user.username || "N/A"}
443	            />
444	            <InfoRow label="Email" value={rental.user.email} breakAll />
445	            <InfoRow
446	              label="Phone"
447	              value={rental.user.phone_number || "N/A"}
448	            />
449	            <TableDivider />
450	            <InfoRow label="Package ID" value={rental.package.id} />
451	            <InfoRow label="Package Name" value={rental.package.name} />
452	            <InfoRow
453	              label="Duration"
454	              value={`${rental.package.duration_minutes} minutes`}
455	            />
456	            <InfoRow
457	              label="Package Price"
458	              value={formatAmount(rental.package.price)}
459	            />
460	          </div>
461	        </div>
462	
463	        {/* Stations & Powerbank */}
464	        <div
465	          className="p-4 sm:p-[22px_24px] border-b border-border md:border-b-0 md:border-r last:border-b-0 last:border-r-0 min-w-0 overflow-hidden"
466	          id="rental-stations-section"
467	        >
468	          <h3 className="text-[11px] font-bold text-accent uppercase tracking-wider mb-3 sm:mb-4 pb-2 sm:pb-2.5 border-b border-border">
469	            Stations &amp; Powerbank
470	          </h3>
471	          <div className="flex flex-col gap-px">
472	            <InfoRow label="Pickup Station" value={rental.station.station_name} />
473	            <InfoRow
474	              label="Pickup Serial"
475	              value={rental.station.serial_number}
476	              mono
477	            />
478	            <InfoRow label="Pickup Address" value={rental.station.address} />
479	            <TableDivider />
480	            <InfoRow
481	              label="Return Station"
482	              value={
483	                rental.return_station?.station_name ||
484	                "Not returned yet"
485	              }
486	            />
487	            <InfoRow
488	              label="Return Serial"
489	              value={rental.return_station?.serial_number || "â€”"}
490	              mono
491	            />
492	            <InfoRow
493	              label="Return Address"
494	              value={rental.return_station?.address || "â€”"}
495	            />
496	            <TableDivider />
497	            <InfoRow
498	              label="Powerbank ID"
499	              value={rental.powerbank?.id || "â€”"}
500	            />
501	            <InfoRow
502	              label="PB Serial"
503	              value={
504	                rental.powerbank?.serial_number ||
505	                "No powerbank assigned"
506	              }
507	              mono
508	            />
509	            <InfoRow
510	              label="Model"
511	              value={rental.powerbank?.model || "â€”"}
512	            />
513	          </div>
514	        </div>
515	
516	        {/* Timeline & Payment */}
517	        <div
518	          className="p-4 sm:p-[22px_24px] last:border-b-0 last:border-r-0 min-w-0 overflow-hidden"
519	          id="rental-timeline-section"
520	        >
521	          <h3 className="text-[11px] font-bold text-accent uppercase tracking-wider mb-3 sm:mb-4 pb-2 sm:pb-2.5 border-b border-border">
522	            Timeline &amp; Payment
523	          </h3>
524	          <div className="flex flex-col gap-px">
525	            <InfoRow
526	              label="Created"
527	              value={formatDateTime(rental.created_at)}
528	            />
529	            <InfoRow
530	              label="Started"
531	              value={formatDateTime(rental.started_at)}
532	            />
533	            <InfoRow
534	              label="Due"
535	              value={formatDateTime(rental.due_at)}
536	            />
537	            <InfoRow
538	              label="Ended"
539	              value={formatDateTime(rental.ended_at)}
540	            />
541	            <InfoRow
542	              label="Updated"
543	              value={formatDateTime(rental.updated_at)}
544	            />
545	            <TableDivider />
546	            <InfoRow
547	              label="Amount Paid"
548	              value={formatAmount(rental.amount_paid)}
549	              highlight
550	              customColor="text-[#47b216]"
551	            />
552	            <InfoRow
553	              label="Overdue Amount"
554	              value={formatAmount(rental.overdue_amount)}
555	              customColor={
556	                overdueValue > 0
557	                  ? "text-[#dc3545]"
558	                  : "text-text-muted"
559	              }
560	            />
561	            <InfoRow
562	              label="Total Collected"
563	              value={formatAmount(totalValue.toString())}
564	              highlight
565	            />
566	          </div>
567	        </div>
568	      </section>
569	
570	      {/* â”€â”€â”€ Sub Sections Grid â”€â”€â”€ */}
571	      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4 sm:gap-5 min-w-0">
572	        {/* Payment Summary */}
573	        <article
574	          className="bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl p-4 sm:p-[22px_24px] min-w-0 overflow-hidden"
575	          id="rental-payment-summary"
576	        >
577	          <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 mb-4 min-w-0">
578	            <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base font-bold text-text-primary truncate">
579	              Payment Summary
580	            </h3>
581	            <span className="text-text-muted text-[11px] sm:text-xs shrink-0">
582	              Financials
583	            </span>
584	          </div>
585	
586	          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 sm:gap-4 min-w-0">
587	            <div className="bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-3 sm:p-4 min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
588	              <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 min-w-0 mb-2">
589	                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-text-primary truncate">
590	                  Package Charge
591	                </span>
592	                <span className="inline-flex px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md text-[11px] font-semibold border bg-[rgba(71,178,22,0.15)] text-[#47b216] border-[#47b216] shrink-0">
593	                  {formatAmount(rental.package.price)}
594	                </span>
595	              </div>
596	              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-x-4 gap-y-1">
597	                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
598	                  Amount Paid:{" "}
599	                  {formatAmount(rental.amount_paid)}
600	                </span>
601	                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
602	                  Overdue:{" "}
603	                  {formatAmount(rental.overdue_amount)}
604	                </span>
605	                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
606	                  Status: {rental.payment_status}
607	                </span>
608	              </div>
609	            </div>
610	
611	            <div className="bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-3 sm:p-4 min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
612	              <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 min-w-0 mb-2">
613	                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-text-primary truncate">
614	                  Return Performance
615	                </span>
616	                <span
617	                  className={`inline-flex px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-[11px] font-semibold border shrink-0 ${
618	                    rental.is_returned_on_time
619	                      ? "bg-[rgba(71,178,22,0.15)] text-[#47b216] border-[#47b216]"
620	                      : "bg-[rgba(220,53,69,0.15)] text-[#dc3545] border-[#dc3545]"
621	                  }`}
622	                >
623	                  {rental.is_returned_on_time ? "On Time" : "Late"}
624	                </span>
625	              </div>
626	              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-x-4 gap-y-1">
627	                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
628	                  Timely Return Bonus:{" "}
629	                  {rental.timely_return_bonus_awarded
630	                    ? "Awarded"
631	                    : "Not awarded"}
632	                </span>
633	                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
634	                  Extensions: {rental.extensions_count}
635	                </span>
636	                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
637	                  Issues Logged: {rental.issues_count}
638	                </span>
639	              </div>
640	            </div>
641	          </div>
642	        </article>
643	
644	        {/* Additional Info */}
645	        <article
646	          className="bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl p-4 sm:p-[22px_24px] min-w-0 overflow-hidden"
647	          id="rental-additional-info"

649	          <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 mb-4 min-w-0">
650	            <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base font-bold text-text-primary truncate">

654	              Context
655	            </span>
656	          </div>
657	
658	          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 sm:gap-4 min-w-0">
659	            <div className="bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-3 sm:p-4 min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
660	              <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 min-w-0 mb-2">
661	                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-text-primary truncate">
662	                  User Contact
663	                </span>
664	                <span className="inline-flex px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md text-[11px] font-semibold border bg-[rgba(23,162,184,0.15)] text-[#17a2b8] border-[#17a2b8] shrink-0">
665	                  Primary
666	                </span>
667	              </div>

677	                </span>

690	                >
691	                  {rental.status.replace(/_/g, " ")}

695	                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">

697	                </span>
698	                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
699	                  Return:{" "}

702	                </span>
703	                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
704	                  Powerbank:{" "}
705	                  {rental.powerbank?.serial_number || "Unassigned"}
706	                </span>
707	              </div>
708	            </div>
709	          </div>
710	        </article>
711	      </div>
712	
713	      {/* â”€â”€â”€ Metadata Section â”€â”€â”€ */}
714	      {metadataEntries.length > 0 && (
715	        <section className="bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl p-4 md:p-5 min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
716	          <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 mb-4 min-w-0">
717	            <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base font-bold text-text-primary truncate">
718	              Rental Metadata
719	            </h3>
720	            <span className="text-text-muted text-[11px] sm:text-xs shrink-0">
721	              {metadataEntries.length} entries
722	            </span>
723	          </div>
724	
725	          <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 sm:gap-3 min-w-0">
726	            {metadataEntries.map(([key, value]) => (
727	              <div
728	                key={key}
729	                className="bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-3 sm:p-4 min-w-0 overflow-hidden"
730	              >
731	                <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 min-w-0">
732	                  <span className="text-sm font-medium text-text-primary truncate">
733	                    {key.replace(/_/g, " ")}
734	                  </span>
735	                  <span className="inline-flex px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md text-[11px] font-semibold border bg-[rgba(108,117,125,0.15)] text-[#6c757d] border-[#6c757d] shrink-0">
736	                    Meta
737	                  </span>
738	                </div>
739	                <p className="text-xs text-text-secondary break-words mt-1">
740	                  {formatMetadataValue(value)}
741	                </p>
742	              </div>
743	            ))}
744	          </div>
745	        </section>
746	      )}
747	    </main>
748	  );
749	}
750	
751	/* â”€â”€â”€ Sub-components â”€â”€â”€ */
752	
753	function InfoRow({
754	  label,
755	  value,
756	  mono = false,
757	  breakAll = false,
758	  highlight = false,
759	  customColor,
760	}: {
761	  label: string;
762	  value: React.ReactNode;
763	  mono?: boolean;
764	  breakAll?: boolean;
765	  highlight?: boolean;
766	  customColor?: string;
767	}) {
768	  return (
769	    <div className="flex justify-between items-baseline py-1.5 gap-4">
770	      <label className="text-text-muted text-xs shrink-0 sm:w-[100px]">
771	        {label}
772	      </label>
773	      <span
774	        className={`text-xs sm:text-right break-words min-w-0 ${
775	          breakAll ? "break-all" : ""
776	        } ${mono ? "font-mono" : ""} ${
777	          customColor || highlight
778	            ? `font-semibold ${customColor || "text-accent-light"}`
779	            : "text-text-primary"
780	        }`}
781	      >
782	        {value}
783	      </span>
784	    </div>
785	  );
786	}
787	
788	function TableDivider() {
789	  return <div className="border-t border-border my-2 sm:my-3" />;
790	}

```

19	class SignatureTestCase(TestCase):
20	    """Test signature generation and validation"""
21	    
22	    def setUp(self):
23	        self.secret_key = "test-secret-key-for-testing-only"
24	        self.sign_util = SignChargeGharMain(secret_key=self.secret_key)
25	    
26	    def test_signature_generation(self):
27	        """Test that signature generation is consistent"""
28	        payload = '{"test":"data"}'
29	        timestamp = 1698345600
30	        
31	        sig1 = self.sign_util.generate_signature(payload, timestamp)
32	        sig2 = self.sign_util.generate_signature(payload, timestamp)
33	        
34	        self.assertEqual(sig1, sig2)
35	        self.assertIsInstance(sig1, str)
36	        self.assertGreater(len(sig1), 0)
37	    
38	    def test_signature_validation_success(self):
39	        """Test that valid signature passes validation"""
40	        payload = '{"test":"data"}'
41	        timestamp = int(self.sign_util.get_current_timestamp())
42	        
43	        signature = self.sign_util.generate_signature(payload, timestamp)
44	        is_valid, error = self.sign_util.validate_signature(payload, timestamp, signature, time_tolerance=10)
45	        
46	        self.assertTrue(is_valid)
47	        self.assertEqual(error, "")
48	    
49	    def test_signature_validation_invalid_signature(self):
50	        """Test that invalid signature fails validation"""
51	        payload = '{"test":"data"}'
52	        timestamp = int(self.sign_util.get_current_timestamp())
53	        
54	        is_valid, error = self.sign_util.validate_signature(payload, timestamp, "invalid-signature", time_tolerance=10)
55	        
56	        self.assertFalse(is_valid)
57	        self.assertIn("mismatch", error.lower())
58	    
59	    def test_signature_validation_expired_timestamp(self):
60	        """Test that old timestamp fails validation"""
61	        payload = '{"test":"data"}'
62	        timestamp = 1609459200  # Jan 1, 2021 (very old)
63	        
64	        signature = self.sign_util.generate_signature(payload, timestamp)
65	        is_valid, error = self.sign_util.validate_signature(payload, timestamp, signature, time_tolerance=300)
66	        
67	        self.assertFalse(is_valid)
68	        self.assertIn("too old", error.lower())
69	
70	
71	class StationSyncAPITestCase(TestCase):
72	    """Test station synchronization API endpoint"""
73	    
74	    def setUp(self):
75	        self.client = APIClient()
76	
77	        self.admin_user = User.objects.create_superuser(
78	            identifier='admin@test.com', username='admin', password='testpass123'
79	        )
80	        
81	        self.client.force_authenticate(user=self.admin_user)
82	        
83	        self.secret_key = "test-secret-key-for-testing-only"
84	        self.sign_util = SignChargeGharMain(secret_key=self.secret_key)
85	    
86	    def _create_signed_request(self, payload_data):
87	        """Helper to create properly signed request"""
88	        payload = json.dumps(payload_data)
89	        timestamp = int(time.time())
90	        signature = self.sign_util.generate_signature(payload, timestamp)
91	        
92	        return {
93	            'data': payload_data,
94	            'headers': {
95	                'HTTP_X_SIGNATURE': signature,
96	                'HTTP_X_TIMESTAMP': str(timestamp),
97	                'CONTENT_TYPE': 'application/json'
98	            }
99	        }
100	    
101	    def test_full_station_sync_without_signature(self):
102	        """Test that request without signature is rejected"""
103	        payload = {
104	            "type": "full",
105	            "timestamp": int(time.time()),
106	            "device": {"serial_number": "TEST12345", "status": "ONLINE"},
107	            "station": {"total_slots": 2},
108	            "slots": [],
109	            "power_banks": []
110	        }
111	        
112	        response = self.client.post(
113	            '/api/internal/stations/data',
114	            data=json.dumps(payload),
115	            content_type='application/json'
116	        )
117	        
118	        self.assertEqual(response.status_code, 400)
119	        self.assertFalse(response.json()['success'])
120	        self.assertIn('signature', response.json()['error']['message'].lower())
121	    
122	    def test_full_station_sync_with_valid_signature(self):
123	        """Test full station synchronization with valid signature"""
124	        with self.settings(IOT_SYSTEM_SIGNATURE_SECRET=self.secret_key):
125	            payload_data = {
126	                "type": "full",
127	                "timestamp": int(time.time()),
128	                "device": {
129	                    "serial_number": "TEST12345",
130	                    "imei": "TEST12345",
131	                    "status": "ONLINE",
132	                    "last_heartbeat": "2025-10-27T14:30:00Z",
133	                    "hardware_info": {"firmware_version": "2.1.5"}
134	                },
135	                "station": {"total_slots": 2},
136	                "slots": [
137	                    {"slot_number": 1, "status": "AVAILABLE", "battery_level": 0, "slot_metadata": {}},
138	                    {"slot_number": 2, "status": "OCCUPIED", "battery_level": 85, "power_bank_serial": "PB12345", "slot_metadata": {}}
139	                ],
140	                "power_banks": [
141	                    {"serial_number": "PB12345", "status": "AVAILABLE", "battery_level": 85, "current_slot": 2, "hardware_info": {"temperature": 30, "voltage": 5000}}
142	                ]
143	            }
144	            
145	            request_data = self._create_signed_request(payload_data)
146	            
147	            response = self.client.post(
148	                '/api/internal/stations/data',
149	                data=json.dumps(request_data['data']),
150	                content_type='application/json',
151	                **request_data['headers']
152	            )
153	            
154	            self.assertEqual(response.status_code, 200)
155	            response_data = response.json()
156	            self.assertTrue(response_data['success'])
157	            
158	            station = Station.objects.get(serial_number="TEST12345")
159	            self.assertEqual(station.status, 'ONLINE')
160	            self.assertEqual(station.total_slots, 2)
161	            
162	            slots = StationSlot.objects.filter(station=station)
163	            self.assertEqual(slots.count(), 2)
164	            
165	            powerbanks = PowerBank.objects.filter(serial_number="PB12345")
166	            self.assertEqual(powerbanks.count(), 1)
167	            self.assertEqual(powerbanks.first().battery_level, 85)
168	
169	    def test_full_station_sync_matches_existing_station_by_imei(self):
170	        """Station matching should use IMEI even when station serial was admin-configured."""
171	        with self.settings(IOT_SYSTEM_SIGNATURE_SECRET=self.secret_key):
172	            station = Station.objects.create(
173	                station_name="Configured Station",
174	                serial_number="ADMIN-CONFIGURED-SN",
175	                imei="868522071408102",
176	                latitude=Decimal("0.0"),

178	                address="Configured Address",
179	                total_slots=4,
180	                status="OFFLINE",

182	            )
183	
184	            payload_data = {

"""
Station sync mixin - handles full station synchronization
"""
from __future__ import annotations

from typing import Dict, Any
from decimal import Decimal
from django.utils import timezone
from django.utils.dateparse import parse_datetime
from django.db import transaction
import time

from api.common.services.base import ServiceException
from api.user.stations.models import Station, StationSlot, PowerBank
from api.internal.services.iot_sync_log_service import IoTSyncLogService


class StationSyncMixin:
    """Mixin for full station synchronization operations"""
    
    @transaction.atomic
    def sync_station_data(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """
        Sync complete station data (full sync)
        
        Args:
            data: Full data payload from IoT system
            
        Returns:
            Summary of sync operation
        """
        start_time = time.time()
        station = None
        log_status = 'SUCCESS'
        error_message = None
        result = {}
        
        try:
            self._validate_sync_data(data)
            
            device_data = data.get('device', {})
            station_data = data.get('station', {})
            slots_data = data.get('slots', [])
            powerbanks_data = data.get('power_banks', [])
            
            station_identifier = self._resolve_station_imei(device_data)
            
            station = self._sync_station(device_data, station_data)
            slots_updated = self._sync_slots(station, slots_data)
            powerbanks_updated = self._sync_powerbanks(station, powerbanks_data)
            
            # Track status change
            new_status = self.STATION_STATUS_MAP.get(device_data.get('status', 'OFFLINE'), 'OFFLINE')
            IoTSyncLogService.track_status_change(station, new_status, 'SYNC')
            
            result = {
                'station_id': str(station.id),
                'station_serial': station.serial_number,
                'slots_updated': slots_updated,
                'powerbanks_updated': powerbanks_updated,
                'timestamp': timezone.now().isoformat()
            }
            
            self.log_info(
                f"Station sync completed for {station_identifier}: {slots_updated} slots, {powerbanks_updated} powerbanks"
            )
            return result
            
        except ServiceException as e:
            log_status = 'FAILED'
            error_message = str(e)
            raise
        except Exception as e:
            log_status = 'FAILED'
            error_message = str(e)
            self.handle_service_error(e, "Failed to sync station data")
        finally:
            # Log sync operation
            if station:
                duration_ms = int((time.time() - start_time) * 1000)
                device_data = data.get('device', {})
                IoTSyncLogService.log_sync(
                    station=station,
                    device_uuid=device_data.get('imei', device_data.get('serial_number', 'unknown')),
                    sync_type='FULL',
                    direction='INBOUND',
                    request_payload=data,
                    response_payload=result,
                    status=log_status,
                    error_message=error_message,
                    duration_ms=duration_ms
                )
    
    def _sync_station(self, device_data: Dict, station_data: Dict) -> Station:
        """Update or create Station record"""
        try:
            imei = self._resolve_station_imei(device_data)
            serial_number = device_data.get('serial_number') or imei
            
            last_heartbeat_str = device_data.get('last_heartbeat')
            last_heartbeat = None
            if last_heartbeat_str:
                try:
                    last_heartbeat = parse_datetime(last_heartbeat_str)
                except ValueError:
                    self.log_warning(f"Invalid heartbeat format: {last_heartbeat_str}")
            
            station, created = Station.objects.get_or_create(
                imei=imei,
                defaults={
                    'serial_number': serial_number,
                    'station_name': f'Station {serial_number[-4:]}',
                    'latitude': Decimal('0.0'),
                    'longitude': Decimal('0.0'),
                    'address': 'Pending Configuration',
                    'total_slots': station_data.get('total_slots', 0),
                    'status': self.STATION_STATUS_MAP.get(device_data.get('status', 'OFFLINE'), 'OFFLINE'),
                    'hardware_info': device_data.get('hardware_info', {}),
                    'last_heartbeat': last_heartbeat or timezone.now()
                }
            )
            
            if not created:
                self._update_existing_station(station, device_data, station_data, last_heartbeat)
            else:
                self.log_info(f"Created new station {serial_number} ({imei})")
            
            return station
            
        except Exception as e:
            self.log_error(f"Error syncing station {device_data.get('serial_number')}: {str(e)}")
            raise ServiceException(detail=f"Failed to sync station: {str(e)}", code="station_sync_error")
    
    def _update_existing_station(self, station: Station, device_data: Dict, station_data: Dict, last_heartbeat) -> None:
        """Update existing station with new data"""
        station.total_slots = station_data.get('total_slots', station.total_slots)
        station.status = self.STATION_STATUS_MAP.get(device_data.get('status', 'OFFLINE'), 'OFFLINE')
        station.hardware_info = device_data.get('hardware_info', {})
        station.last_heartbeat = last_heartbeat or timezone.now()
        
        if device_data.get('signal_strength'):
            signal_str = str(device_data['signal_strength'])
            try:
                if ':' in signal_str:
                    signal_value = int(signal_str.split(':')[1].strip())
                else:
                    signal_value = int(signal_str)
                station.hardware_info['signal_strength'] = signal_value
            except (ValueError, IndexError) as e:
                self.log_warning(f"Invalid signal_strength format: '{signal_str}', error: {e}")
                station.hardware_info['signal_strength'] = 0
        
        if device_data.get('wifi_ssid'):
            station.hardware_info['wifi_ssid'] = device_data['wifi_ssid']
        
        station.save()
        self.log_info(f"Updated station {station.serial_number}")
    
    def _sync_slots(self, station: Station, slots_data: list) -> int:
        """Update or create StationSlot records"""
        try:
            slots_updated = 0
            
            for slot_info in slots_data:
                slot_number = slot_info.get('slot_number')
                if not slot_number:
                    self.log_warning(f"Slot data missing slot_number: {slot_info}")
                    continue
                
                slot_status = self.SLOT_STATUS_MAP.get(slot_info.get('status', 'AVAILABLE'), 'AVAILABLE')
                battery_level = slot_info.get('battery_level', 0)
                slot_metadata = slot_info.get('slot_metadata', {})
                
                slot, created = StationSlot.objects.get_or_create(
                    station=station,
                    slot_number=slot_number,
                    defaults={'status': slot_status, 'battery_level': battery_level, 'slot_metadata': slot_metadata}
                )
                
                if not created:
                    slot.status = slot_status
                    slot.battery_level = battery_level
                    slot.slot_metadata = slot_metadata
                    slot.save()
                
                slots_updated += 1
            
            self.log_info(f"Updated {slots_updated} slots for station {station.serial_number}")
            return slots_updated
            
        except Exception as e:
            self.log_error(f"Error syncing slots for station {station.serial_number}: {str(e)}")
            raise ServiceException(detail=f"Failed to sync slots: {str(e)}", code="slots_sync_error")
    
    def _sync_powerbanks(self, station: Station, powerbanks_data: list) -> int:
        """Update or create PowerBank records"""
        try:
            powerbanks_updated = 0
            
            for pb_info in powerbanks_data:
                pb_serial = pb_info.get('serial_number')
                if not pb_serial:
                    self.log_warning(f"PowerBank data missing serial_number: {pb_info}")
                    continue
                
                pb_status = self.POWERBANK_STATUS_MAP.get(pb_info.get('status', 'AVAILABLE'), 'AVAILABLE')
                battery_level = pb_info.get('battery_level', 0)
                current_slot_number = pb_info.get('current_slot')
                hardware_info = pb_info.get('hardware_info', {})
                
                current_slot = None
                if current_slot_number:
                    try:
                        current_slot = StationSlot.objects.get(station=station, slot_number=current_slot_number)
                    except StationSlot.DoesNotExist:
                        self.log_warning(f"Slot {current_slot_number} not found for station {station.serial_number}")
                
                powerbank, created = PowerBank.objects.get_or_create(
                    serial_number=pb_serial,
                    defaults={
                        'model': 'Standard',
                        'capacity_mah': 10000,
                        'status': pb_status,
                        'battery_level': battery_level,
                        'hardware_info': hardware_info,
                        'current_station': station,
                        'current_slot': current_slot
                    }
                )
                
                if not created:
                    powerbank.status = pb_status
                    powerbank.battery_level = battery_level
                    powerbank.hardware_info = hardware_info
                    powerbank.current_station = station
                    powerbank.current_slot = current_slot
                    powerbank.save()
                
                powerbanks_updated += 1
            
            self.log_info(f"Updated {powerbanks_updated} powerbanks for station {station.serial_number}")
            return powerbanks_updated
            
        except Exception as e:
            self.log_error(f"Error syncing powerbanks for station {station.serial_number}: {str(e)}")
            raise ServiceException(detail=f"Failed to sync powerbanks: {str(e)}", code="powerbanks_sync_error")

```

"""
Admin Rental Views - Rental management and issue operations
"""
import logging

from drf_spectacular.utils import extend_schema, OpenApiParameter
from drf_spectacular.types import OpenApiTypes
from rest_framework.generics import GenericAPIView
from rest_framework.request import Request
from rest_framework.response import Response

from api.admin import serializers
from api.admin.services import AdminRentalService
from api.common.decorators import log_api_call
from api.common.mixins import BaseAPIView
from api.common.routers import CustomViewRouter
from api.common.serializers import BaseResponseSerializer, PaginatedResponseSerializer
from api.user.auth.permissions import IsStaffPermission

rental_router = CustomViewRouter()
logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)


@rental_router.register(r"admin/rentals", name="admin-rentals")
@extend_schema(
    tags=["Admin - Rentals"],
    summary="List Rentals",
    description="Get list of all rentals with filtering and pagination (Staff only)",
    parameters=[
        OpenApiParameter("status", OpenApiTypes.STR, description="Filter by status (PENDING, ACTIVE, COMPLETED, CANCELLED, OVERDUE)"),
        OpenApiParameter("payment_status", OpenApiTypes.STR, description="Filter by payment status (PENDING, PAID, FAILED, REFUNDED)"),
        OpenApiParameter("user_id", OpenApiTypes.INT, description="Filter by user ID"),
        OpenApiParameter("station_id", OpenApiTypes.STR, description="Filter by station ID"),
        OpenApiParameter("search", OpenApiTypes.STR, description="Search by rental code or user name/phone"),
        OpenApiParameter("recent", OpenApiTypes.STR, description="Recent rentals: 'today', '24h', '7d', '30d'"),
        OpenApiParameter("start_date", OpenApiTypes.DATETIME, description="Filter rentals started after this date"),
        OpenApiParameter("end_date", OpenApiTypes.DATETIME, description="Filter rentals started before this date"),
        OpenApiParameter("page", OpenApiTypes.INT, description="Page number"),
        OpenApiParameter("page_size", OpenApiTypes.INT, description="Items per page"),
    ],
    responses={200: PaginatedResponseSerializer}
)
class AdminRentalsListView(GenericAPIView, BaseAPIView):
    """Admin rentals list with comprehensive filtering"""
    serializer_class = serializers.AdminRentalSerializer
    permission_classes = [IsStaffPermission]

    @log_api_call()
    def get(self, request: Request) -> Response:
        """Get list of rentals with optional filtering"""
        def operation():
            # Parse filters
            filters = {
                'status': request.query_params.get('status'),
                'payment_status': request.query_params.get('payment_status'),
                'user_id': request.query_params.get('user_id'),
                'station_id': request.query_params.get('station_id'),
                'search': request.query_params.get('search'),
                'recent': request.query_params.get('recent'),
                'start_date': request.query_params.get('start_date'),
                'end_date': request.query_params.get('end_date'),
                'page': int(request.query_params.get('page', 1)),
                'page_size': int(request.query_params.get('page_size', 20)),
            }
            
            # Remove None values
            filters = {k: v for k, v in filters.items() if v is not None}
            
            # Get rentals
            service = AdminRentalService()
            rentals_data = service.get_rentals_list(filters)
            
            # Serialize rentals
            serializer = serializers.AdminRentalSerializer(
                rentals_data['results'], many=True
            )
            
            return {
                'results': serializer.data,
                'pagination': rentals_data['pagination']
            }
        
        return self.handle_service_operation(
            operation,
            "Rentals retrieved successfully",
            "Failed to retrieve rentals"
        )


# IMPORTANT: Specific routes must come before generic ones
# /admin/rentals/issues must come before /admin/rentals/<rental_id>

@rental_router.register(r"admin/rentals/issues", name="admin-rental-issues")
@extend_schema(
    tags=["Admin - Rentals"],
    summary="List Rental Issues",
    description="Get list of all rental issues reported by users with filtering (Staff only)",
    responses={200: BaseResponseSerializer}
)
class AdminRentalIssuesView(GenericAPIView, BaseAPIView):
    """Admin rental issues list and management"""
    permission_classes = [IsStaffPermission]

    @log_api_call()
    def get(self, request: Request) -> Response:
        """Get list of rental issues with optional filtering"""
        def operation():
            # Get query parameters
            status_filter = request.query_params.get('status')
            issue_type = request.query_params.get('issue_type')
            search = request.query_params.get('search')
            ordering = request.query_params.get('ordering', '-reported_at')
            
            # Get issues
            service = AdminRentalService()
            issues = service.get_rental_issues(
                status=status_filter,
                issue_type=issue_type,
                search=search,
                ordering=ordering
            )
            
            # Paginate
            page = self.paginate_queryset(issues)
            if page is not None:
                serializer = serializers.AdminRentalIssueSerializer(page, many=True)
                return self.get_paginated_response(serializer.data)
            
            serializer = serializers.AdminRentalIssueSerializer(issues, many=True)
            return serializer.data
        
        return self.handle_service_operation(
            operation,
            "Rental issues retrieved successfully",
            "Failed to retrieve rental issues"
        )


@rental_router.register(r"admin/rentals/issues/<str:issue_id>", name="admin-rental-issue-detail")
@extend_schema(
    tags=["Admin - Rentals"],
    summary="Rental Issue Detail",
    description="Get, update or delete a specific rental issue (Staff only)",
    responses={200: BaseResponseSerializer}
)
class AdminRentalIssueDetailView(GenericAPIView, BaseAPIView):
    """Admin rental issue detail, update, and delete"""
    permission_classes = [IsStaffPermission]

    @log_api_call()
    def get(self, request: Request, issue_id: str) -> Response:
        """Get specific rental issue details"""
        def operation():
            service = AdminRentalService()
            issue = service.get_rental_issue(issue_id)
            serializer = serializers.AdminRentalIssueDetailSerializer(issue)
            return serializer.data
        
        return self.handle_service_operation(
            operation,
            "Rental issue retrieved successfully",
            "Failed to retrieve rental issue"
        )

    @extend_schema(
        request=serializers.UpdateRentalIssueSerializer
    )
    @log_api_call(include_request_data=True)
    def patch(self, request: Request, issue_id: str) -> Response:
        """Update rental issue status"""
        def operation():
            serializer = serializers.UpdateRentalIssueSerializer(data=request.data)
            serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)
            
            service = AdminRentalService()
            issue = service.update_rental_issue_status(
                issue_id=issue_id,
                status=serializer.validated_data['status'],
                admin_user=request.user,
                notes=serializer.validated_data.get('notes'),
                request=request
            )
            
            result_serializer = serializers.AdminRentalIssueDetailSerializer(issue)
            return result_serializer.data
        
        return self.handle_service_operation(
            operation,
            "Rental issue status updated successfully",
            "Failed to update rental issue status"
        )

    @log_api_call()
    def delete(self, request: Request, issue_id: str) -> Response:
        """Delete rental issue (soft delete)"""
        def operation():
            service = AdminRentalService()
            return service.delete_rental_issue(
                issue_id=issue_id,
                admin_user=request.user,
                request=request
            )
        
        return self.handle_service_operation(
            operation,
            "Rental issue deleted successfully",
            "Failed to delete rental issue"
        )


# Generic route with <rental_id> parameter - MUST come after specific routes
@rental_router.register(r"admin/rentals/<str:rental_id>", name="admin-rental-detail")
@extend_schema(
    tags=["Admin - Rentals"],
    summary="Rental Detail",
    description="Get detailed information about a specific rental (Staff only)",
    responses={200: BaseResponseSerializer}
)
class AdminRentalDetailView(GenericAPIView, BaseAPIView):
    """Admin rental detail view"""
    serializer_class = serializers.AdminRentalDetailSerializer
    permission_classes = [IsStaffPermission]

    @log_api_call()
    def get(self, request: Request, rental_id: str) -> Response:
        """Get specific rental details"""
        def operation():
            service = AdminRentalService()
            rental = service.get_rental_detail(rental_id)
            serializer = serializers.AdminRentalDetailSerializer(rental)
            return serializer.data
        
        return self.handle_service_operation(
            operation,
            "Rental details retrieved successfully",
            "Failed to retrieve rental details"
        )

```
