```text
"use client";

import React, { useState, useEffect, use, useMemo } from "react";
import { useRouter } from "next/navigation";
import {
  FiArrowLeft,
  FiUser,
  FiMapPin,
  FiDollarSign,
  FiClock,
  FiCalendar,
  FiActivity,
  FiInfo,
  FiXCircle,
  FiAlertCircle,
} from "react-icons/fi";
import { toast } from "sonner";

interface RentalDetail {
  id: string;
  rental_code: string;
  status: string;
  payment_status: string;
  user: {
    id: number;
    username: string | null;
    phone_number: string | null;
    email: string;
  };
  station: {
    id: string;
    station_name: string;
    serial_number: string;
    address: string;
  };
  return_station: {
    id: string;
    station_name: string;
    serial_number: string;
    address: string;
  } | null;
  slot_number: number;
  powerbank: {
    id: string;
    serial_number: string;
    model: string;
  } | null;
  package: {
    id: string;
    name: string;
    duration_minutes: number;
    price: string;
  };
  started_at: string;
  ended_at: string | null;
  due_at: string;
  created_at: string;
  updated_at: string;
  amount_paid: string;
  overdue_amount: string;
  is_returned_on_time: boolean;
  timely_return_bonus_awarded: boolean;
  extensions_count: number;
  issues_count: number;
  rental_metadata: Record<string, unknown>;
}

const statusStyles: Record<string, string> = {
  ACTIVE:
    "bg-[rgba(23,162,184,0.15)] text-[#17a2b8] border-[#17a2b8]",
  COMPLETED:
    "bg-[rgba(71,178,22,0.15)] text-[#47b216] border-[#47b216]",
  PENDING:
    "bg-[rgba(255,193,7,0.15)] text-[#ffc107] border-[#ffc107]",
  CANCELLED:
    "bg-[rgba(108,117,125,0.15)] text-[#6c757d] border-[#6c757d]",
  OVERDUE:
    "bg-[rgba(220,53,69,0.15)] text-[#dc3545] border-[#dc3545]",
};

const paymentStyles: Record<string, string> = {
  PAID: "bg-[rgba(71,178,22,0.15)] text-[#47b216] border-[#47b216]",
  DUE: "bg-[rgba(255,193,7,0.15)] text-[#ffc107] border-[#ffc107]",
  PENDING:
    "bg-[rgba(255,193,7,0.15)] text-[#ffc107] border-[#ffc107]",
  FAILED:
    "bg-[rgba(220,53,69,0.15)] text-[#dc3545] border-[#dc3545]",
  REFUNDED:
    "bg-[rgba(23,162,184,0.15)] text-[#17a2b8] border-[#17a2b8]",
};

const defaultBadgeStyle =
  "bg-[rgba(108,117,125,0.15)] text-[#6c757d] border-[#6c757d]";

function formatDateTime(dateString: string | null) {
  if (!dateString) return "N/A";
  return new Date(dateString).toLocaleString("en-GB", {
    day: "2-digit",
    month: "short",
    year: "numeric",
    hour: "2-digit",
    minute: "2-digit",
  });
}

function formatAmount(amount: string | number) {
  return `Rs. ${parseFloat(String(amount)).toLocaleString()}`;
}

function formatMetadataValue(value: unknown): string {
  if (value === null || value === undefined || value === "")
    return "â€”";
  if (typeof value === "boolean") return value ? "Yes" : "No";
  if (typeof value === "object") return JSON.stringify(value);
  return String(value);
}

export default function RentalDetailPage({
  params,
}: {
  params: Promise<{ rental_id: string }>;
}) {
  const router = useRouter();
  const { rental_id } = use(params);
  const [rental, setRental] = useState<RentalDetail | null>(null);
  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(true);
  const [error, setError] = useState<string | null>(null);
  const [forceCompleting, setForceCompleting] = useState(false);

  useEffect(() => {
    fetchRentalDetail();
  }, [rental_id]);

  const fetchRentalDetail = async () => {
    try {
      setLoading(true);
      const token = localStorage.getItem("accessToken");
      const response = await fetch(`/api/admin/rentals/${rental_id}`, {
        headers: { Authorization: `Bearer ${token}` },
      });
      const data = await response.json();
      if (data.success) {
        setRental(data.data);
      } else {
        setError(data.message || "Failed to load rental details");
        toast.error("Failed to load rental details");
      }
    } catch {
      setError("Failed to load rental details");
      toast.error("Failed to load rental details");
    } finally {
      setLoading(false);
    }
  };

  const handleJumpToSection = (sectionId: string) => {
    document.getElementById(sectionId)?.scrollIntoView({
      behavior: "smooth",
      block: "start",
    });
  };

  const metadataEntries = useMemo(() => {
    if (!rental?.rental_metadata) return [];
    return Object.entries(rental.rental_metadata).filter(
      ([, v]) => v !== null && v !== undefined && v !== "",
    );
  }, [rental]);

  const overdueValue = parseFloat(rental?.overdue_amount || "0");
  const paidValue = parseFloat(rental?.amount_paid || "0");
  const totalValue = paidValue + overdueValue;
  const canForceComplete =
    rental?.status === "ACTIVE" || rental?.status === "OVERDUE";
  const isManualDue =
    rental?.payment_status === "PENDING" &&
    Boolean(rental?.rental_metadata?.manual_return_override);
  const paymentStatusKey =
    (isManualDue ? "DUE" : rental?.payment_status) || "PENDING";
  const paymentStatusDisplay = paymentStatusKey?.replace(/_/g, " ") || "N/A";

  const handleForceComplete = async () => {
    if (!rental || !canForceComplete || forceCompleting) return;

    const confirmed = window.confirm(
      `Force complete rental ${rental.rental_code}? This will mark rental as completed and payment as due.`,
    );
    if (!confirmed) return;

    try {
      setForceCompleting(true);
      const token = localStorage.getItem("accessToken");
      const response = await fetch(
        `/api/admin/rentals/${rental_id}/force-complete`,
        {
          method: "POST",
          headers: {
            Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,
            "Content-Type": "application/json",
          },
          body: JSON.stringify({}),
        },
      );

      const data = await response.json();
      if (!response.ok || !data.success) {
        const errorMessage =
          data?.error?.message || data?.message || "Failed to force complete rental";
        throw new Error(errorMessage);
      }

      toast.success("Rental force-completed and payment marked due");
      await fetchRentalDetail();
    } catch (err: any) {
      const message =
        err?.message || "Failed to force complete rental";
      toast.error(message);
    } finally {
      setForceCompleting(false);
    }
  };

  if (loading) {
    return (
      <div className="p-4 sm:p-5 lg:p-8 max-w-[1440px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#0b0b0b]">
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh] gap-4">
          <div className="w-10 h-10 rounded-sm border-[3px] border-surface-raised border-t-accent animate-spin" />
          <p className="text-text-secondary text-sm">
            Loading rental details...
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  if (error || !rental) {
    return (
      <div className="p-4 sm:p-5 lg:p-8 max-w-[1440px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#0b0b0b]">
        <div className="flex flex-col items-center justify-center min-h-[60vh] gap-4 text-center px-4">
          <FiXCircle className="text-5xl text-danger" />
          <h2 className="text-xl font-semibold text-text-primary">
            Error Loading Rental
          </h2>
          <p className="text-sm text-text-secondary max-w-xs">
            {error || "Rental not found"}
          </p>
          <button
            onClick={() => router.back()}
            className="btn-primary mt-1"
            type="button"
          >
            Go Back
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>
    );
  }

  return (
    <main className="p-4 sm:p-5 lg:p-8 max-w-[1440px] mx-auto min-h-screen bg-[#0b0b0b] space-y-5 lg:space-y-6 overflow-x-hidden">
      {/* â”€â”€â”€ Back â”€â”€â”€ */}
      <button
        className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 text-sm text-accent p-2 px-3 rounded-md hover:bg-accent/10 transition-colors"
        onClick={() => router.back()}
        type="button"
      >
        <FiArrowLeft className="text-sm shrink-0" />
        <span className="truncate">Back to Rentals</span>
      </button>

      {/* â”€â”€â”€ Header â”€â”€â”€ */}
      <header className="flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-start md:justify-between gap-4 min-w-0">
        <div className="min-w-0 flex-1">
          <h1 className="text-xl sm:text-2xl md:text-[28px] font-bold text-text-primary leading-tight break-words font-mono">
            {rental.rental_code}
          </h1>
          <p className="text-[13px] sm:text-sm md:text-[15px] text-text-secondary mt-2 flex items-center gap-1.5 flex-wrap min-w-0">
            <FiUser className="text-sm shrink-0" />
            <span className="break-words min-w-0">
              {rental.user.username || rental.user.email}
            </span>
            {rental.station?.station_name && (
              <>
                <span className="shrink-0">Â·</span>
                <span className="break-words min-w-0">
                  Picked up from {rental.station.station_name}
                </span>
              </>
            )}
          </p>
        </div>

        <div className="flex gap-2 items-center shrink-0 w-full md:w-auto md:flex-wrap md:justify-end">
          <button
            type="button"
            className="flex-1 sm:flex-none inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 px-3.5 py-2 bg-surface-raised border border-border-subtle rounded-lg text-text-primary text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-surface-hover hover:border-accent hover:text-accent hover:-translate-y-px transition-all whitespace-nowrap"
            onClick={() =>
              handleJumpToSection("rental-payment-summary")
            }
          >
            <FiDollarSign className="text-sm shrink-0" />
            <span className="truncate">Payment</span>
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            className="flex-1 sm:flex-none inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 px-3.5 py-2 bg-surface-raised border border-border-subtle rounded-lg text-text-primary text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-surface-hover hover:border-accent hover:text-accent hover:-translate-y-px transition-all whitespace-nowrap"
            onClick={() =>
              handleJumpToSection("rental-timeline-section")
            }
          >
            <FiClock className="text-sm shrink-0" />
            <span className="truncate">Timeline</span>
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            className="flex-1 sm:flex-none inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 px-3.5 py-2 bg-surface-raised border border-border-subtle rounded-lg text-text-primary text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold hover:bg-surface-hover hover:border-accent hover:text-accent hover:-translate-y-px transition-all whitespace-nowrap"
            onClick={() =>
              handleJumpToSection("rental-additional-info")
            }
          >
            <FiInfo className="text-sm shrink-0" />
            <span className="truncate">More Info</span>
          </button>
          <button
            type="button"
            onClick={handleForceComplete}
            disabled={!canForceComplete || forceCompleting}
            className="flex-1 sm:flex-none inline-flex items-center justify-center gap-1.5 px-3.5 py-2 rounded-lg text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold border transition-all whitespace-nowrap bg-[rgba(220,53,69,0.12)] border-[rgba(220,53,69,0.45)] text-[#f17a86] hover:bg-[rgba(220,53,69,0.2)] disabled:opacity-50 disabled:cursor-not-allowed disabled:hover:bg-[rgba(220,53,69,0.12)]"
            title={
              canForceComplete
                ? "Force complete this rental"
                : "Force complete is available only for ACTIVE or OVERDUE rentals"
            }
          >
            <FiAlertCircle className="text-sm shrink-0" />
            <span className="truncate">
              {forceCompleting ? "Processing..." : "Force Complete Rental"}
            </span>
          </button>
        </div>
      </header>

      {/* â”€â”€â”€ Status Bar â”€â”€â”€ */}
      <section className="flex flex-col lg:flex-row lg:items-stretch px-3 sm:px-4 md:px-6 py-4 md:py-[18px] bg-surface rounded-xl border border-border overflow-hidden">
        <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 lg:flex-row lg:gap-[18px] lg:flex-[0_1_400px] lg:min-w-0 lg:items-center min-w-0">
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5 min-w-0">
            <span className="text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] font-semibold text-text-muted uppercase tracking-wide">
              Rental Status
            </span>
            <span
              className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold w-fit border ${
                statusStyles[rental.status] || defaultBadgeStyle
              }`}
            >
              <FiActivity className="text-xs shrink-0" />
              <span className="break-words">
                {rental.status.replace(/_/g, " ")}
              </span>
            </span>
          </div>

          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5 min-w-0">
            <span className="text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] font-semibold text-text-muted uppercase tracking-wide">
              Payment
            </span>
            <span
              className={`inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-md text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold w-fit border ${
                paymentStyles[paymentStatusKey] || defaultBadgeStyle
              }`}
            >
              <FiDollarSign className="text-xs shrink-0" />
              <span className="break-words">
                {paymentStatusDisplay}
              </span>
            </span>
          </div>

          <div className="flex flex-col gap-1.5 min-w-0">
            <span className="text-[10px] sm:text-[11px] font-semibold text-text-muted uppercase tracking-wide">
              Returned On Time
            </span>
            <span
              className={`text-xs sm:text-sm font-semibold ${
                rental.is_returned_on_time
                  ? "text-[#47b216]"
                  : "text-[#dc3545]"
              }`}
            >
              {rental.is_returned_on_time ? "Yes" : "No"}
            </span>
          </div>
        </div>

        <div className="w-full h-px lg:w-px lg:h-auto lg:min-h-10 bg-border-subtle my-3 lg:my-0 lg:mx-[18px] shrink-0" />

        <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-2 flex-1 min-w-0 content-start lg:items-center">
          <button
            onClick={() =>
              handleJumpToSection("rental-payment-summary")
            }
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold border bg-accent/15 border-accent/40 text-accent transition-all hover:bg-accent/25 whitespace-nowrap"
            type="button"
          >
            <FiDollarSign className="text-xs shrink-0" />
            Paid {formatAmount(rental.amount_paid)}
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() =>
              handleJumpToSection("rental-timeline-section")
            }
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold border bg-surface-raised border-border-subtle text-text-secondary hover:bg-surface-hover hover:text-white transition-all whitespace-nowrap"
            type="button"
          >
            <FiCalendar className="text-xs shrink-0" />
            Due {formatDateTime(rental.due_at)}
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() =>
              handleJumpToSection("rental-stations-section")
            }
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold border bg-surface-raised border-border-subtle text-text-secondary hover:bg-surface-hover hover:text-white transition-all whitespace-nowrap"
            type="button"
          >
            <FiMapPin className="text-xs shrink-0" />
            Slot #{rental.slot_number}
          </button>
          <button
            onClick={() =>
              handleJumpToSection("rental-additional-info")
            }
            className="inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-3 py-1.5 rounded-lg text-xs font-semibold border bg-surface-raised border-border-subtle text-text-secondary hover:bg-surface-hover hover:text-white transition-all whitespace-nowrap"
            type="button"
          >
            <FiInfo className="text-xs shrink-0" />
            {rental.issues_count} Issue
            {rental.issues_count === 1 ? "" : "s"}
          </button>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* â”€â”€â”€ Data Grid â”€â”€â”€ */}
      <section className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 xl:grid-cols-4 bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl overflow-hidden">
        {/* Rental Details */}
        <div className="p-4 sm:p-[22px_24px] border-b border-border md:border-b-0 md:border-r last:border-b-0 last:border-r-0 min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
          <h3 className="text-[11px] font-bold text-accent uppercase tracking-wider mb-3 sm:mb-4 pb-2 sm:pb-2.5 border-b border-border">
            Rental Details
          </h3>
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-px">
            <InfoRow label="Rental ID" value={rental.id} mono breakAll />
            <InfoRow
              label="Rental Code"
              value={rental.rental_code}
              mono
            />
            <InfoRow
              label="Status"
              value={
                <span
                  className={`inline-flex px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-[11px] font-semibold border ${
                    statusStyles[rental.status] ||
                    defaultBadgeStyle
                  }`}
                >
                  {rental.status.replace(/_/g, " ")}
                </span>
              }
            />
            <InfoRow
              label="Payment"
              value={
                <span
                  className={`inline-flex px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-[11px] font-semibold border ${
                    paymentStyles[paymentStatusKey] ||
                    defaultBadgeStyle
                  }`}
                >
                  {paymentStatusDisplay}
                </span>
              }
            />
            <InfoRow
              label="Slot Number"
              value={`#${rental.slot_number}`}
              highlight
            />
            <InfoRow label="Extensions" value={String(rental.extensions_count)} />
            <InfoRow label="Issues" value={String(rental.issues_count)} />
            <InfoRow
              label="On-Time Return"
              value={rental.is_returned_on_time ? "Yes" : "No"}
            />
            <InfoRow
              label="Bonus Awarded"
              value={rental.timely_return_bonus_awarded ? "Yes" : "No"}
            />
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* User & Package */}
        <div className="p-4 sm:p-[22px_24px] border-b border-border md:border-b-0 md:border-r last:border-b-0 last:border-r-0 min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
          <h3 className="text-[11px] font-bold text-accent uppercase tracking-wider mb-3 sm:mb-4 pb-2 sm:pb-2.5 border-b border-border">
            User &amp; Package
          </h3>
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-px">
            <InfoRow label="User ID" value={`#${rental.user.id}`} />
            <InfoRow
              label="Username"
              value={rental.user.username || "N/A"}
            />
            <InfoRow label="Email" value={rental.user.email} breakAll />
            <InfoRow
              label="Phone"
              value={rental.user.phone_number || "N/A"}
            />
            <TableDivider />
            <InfoRow label="Package ID" value={rental.package.id} />
            <InfoRow label="Package Name" value={rental.package.name} />
            <InfoRow
              label="Duration"
              value={`${rental.package.duration_minutes} minutes`}
            />
            <InfoRow
              label="Package Price"
              value={formatAmount(rental.package.price)}
            />
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Stations & Powerbank */}
        <div
          className="p-4 sm:p-[22px_24px] border-b border-border md:border-b-0 md:border-r last:border-b-0 last:border-r-0 min-w-0 overflow-hidden"
          id="rental-stations-section"
        >
          <h3 className="text-[11px] font-bold text-accent uppercase tracking-wider mb-3 sm:mb-4 pb-2 sm:pb-2.5 border-b border-border">
            Stations &amp; Powerbank
          </h3>
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-px">
            <InfoRow label="Pickup Station" value={rental.station.station_name} />
            <InfoRow
              label="Pickup Serial"
              value={rental.station.serial_number}
              mono
            />
            <InfoRow label="Pickup Address" value={rental.station.address} />
            <TableDivider />
            <InfoRow
              label="Return Station"
              value={
                rental.return_station?.station_name ||
                "Not returned yet"
              }
            />
            <InfoRow
              label="Return Serial"
              value={rental.return_station?.serial_number || "â€”"}
              mono
            />
            <InfoRow
              label="Return Address"
              value={rental.return_station?.address || "â€”"}
            />
            <TableDivider />
            <InfoRow
              label="Powerbank ID"
              value={rental.powerbank?.id || "â€”"}
            />
            <InfoRow
              label="PB Serial"
              value={
                rental.powerbank?.serial_number ||
                "No powerbank assigned"
              }
              mono
            />
            <InfoRow
              label="Model"
              value={rental.powerbank?.model || "â€”"}
            />
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Timeline & Payment */}
        <div
          className="p-4 sm:p-[22px_24px] last:border-b-0 last:border-r-0 min-w-0 overflow-hidden"
          id="rental-timeline-section"
        >
          <h3 className="text-[11px] font-bold text-accent uppercase tracking-wider mb-3 sm:mb-4 pb-2 sm:pb-2.5 border-b border-border">
            Timeline &amp; Payment
          </h3>
          <div className="flex flex-col gap-px">
            <InfoRow
              label="Created"
              value={formatDateTime(rental.created_at)}
            />
            <InfoRow
              label="Started"
              value={formatDateTime(rental.started_at)}
            />
            <InfoRow
              label="Due"
              value={formatDateTime(rental.due_at)}
            />
            <InfoRow
              label="Ended"
              value={formatDateTime(rental.ended_at)}
            />
            <InfoRow
              label="Updated"
              value={formatDateTime(rental.updated_at)}
            />
            <TableDivider />
            <InfoRow
              label="Amount Paid"
              value={formatAmount(rental.amount_paid)}
              highlight
              customColor="text-[#47b216]"
            />
            <InfoRow
              label="Overdue Amount"
              value={formatAmount(rental.overdue_amount)}
              customColor={
                overdueValue > 0
                  ? "text-[#dc3545]"
                  : "text-text-muted"
              }
            />
            <InfoRow
              label="Total Collected"
              value={formatAmount(totalValue.toString())}
              highlight
            />
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      {/* â”€â”€â”€ Sub Sections Grid â”€â”€â”€ */}
      <div className="grid grid-cols-1 lg:grid-cols-2 gap-4 sm:gap-5 min-w-0">
        {/* Payment Summary */}
        <article
          className="bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl p-4 sm:p-[22px_24px] min-w-0 overflow-hidden"
          id="rental-payment-summary"
        >
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 mb-4 min-w-0">
            <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base font-bold text-text-primary truncate">
              Payment Summary
            </h3>
            <span className="text-text-muted text-[11px] sm:text-xs shrink-0">
              Financials
            </span>
          </div>

          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 sm:gap-4 min-w-0">
            <div className="bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-3 sm:p-4 min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 min-w-0 mb-2">
                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-text-primary truncate">
                  Package Charge
                </span>
                <span className="inline-flex px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md text-[11px] font-semibold border bg-[rgba(71,178,22,0.15)] text-[#47b216] border-[#47b216] shrink-0">
                  {formatAmount(rental.package.price)}
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-x-4 gap-y-1">
                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
                  Amount Paid:{" "}
                  {formatAmount(rental.amount_paid)}
                </span>
                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
                  Overdue:{" "}
                  {formatAmount(rental.overdue_amount)}
                </span>
                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
                  Status: {paymentStatusDisplay}
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-3 sm:p-4 min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 min-w-0 mb-2">
                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-text-primary truncate">
                  Return Performance
                </span>
                <span
                  className={`inline-flex px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-[11px] font-semibold border shrink-0 ${
                    rental.is_returned_on_time
                      ? "bg-[rgba(71,178,22,0.15)] text-[#47b216] border-[#47b216]"
                      : "bg-[rgba(220,53,69,0.15)] text-[#dc3545] border-[#dc3545]"
                  }`}
                >
                  {rental.is_returned_on_time ? "On Time" : "Late"}
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-x-4 gap-y-1">
                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
                  Timely Return Bonus:{" "}
                  {rental.timely_return_bonus_awarded
                    ? "Awarded"
                    : "Not awarded"}
                </span>
                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
                  Extensions: {rental.extensions_count}
                </span>
                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
                  Issues Logged: {rental.issues_count}
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </article>

        {/* Additional Info */}
        <article
          className="bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl p-4 sm:p-[22px_24px] min-w-0 overflow-hidden"
          id="rental-additional-info"
        >
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 mb-4 min-w-0">
            <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base font-bold text-text-primary truncate">
              Additional Information
            </h3>
            <span className="text-text-muted text-[11px] sm:text-xs shrink-0">
              Context
            </span>
          </div>

          <div className="flex flex-col gap-3 sm:gap-4 min-w-0">
            <div className="bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-3 sm:p-4 min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 min-w-0 mb-2">
                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-text-primary truncate">
                  User Contact
                </span>
                <span className="inline-flex px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md text-[11px] font-semibold border bg-[rgba(23,162,184,0.15)] text-[#17a2b8] border-[#17a2b8] shrink-0">
                  Primary
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-x-4 gap-y-1">
                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
                  Email: {rental.user.email}
                </span>
                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
                  Phone: {rental.user.phone_number || "N/A"}
                </span>
                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
                  Pickup Slot: #{rental.slot_number}
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div className="bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-3 sm:p-4 min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
              <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 min-w-0 mb-2">
                <span className="text-sm font-medium text-text-primary truncate">
                  Operational Summary
                </span>
                <span
                  className={`inline-flex px-2 py-0.5 rounded-sm text-[11px] font-semibold border shrink-0 ${
                    statusStyles[rental.status] || defaultBadgeStyle
                  }`}
                >
                  {rental.status.replace(/_/g, " ")}
                </span>
              </div>
              <div className="flex flex-wrap gap-x-4 gap-y-1">
                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
                  Pickup: {rental.station.station_name}
                </span>
                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
                  Return:{" "}
                  {rental.return_station?.station_name ||
                    "Pending return"}
                </span>
                <span className="text-xs text-text-muted">
                  Powerbank:{" "}
                  {rental.powerbank?.serial_number || "Unassigned"}
                </span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </article>
      </div>

      {/* â”€â”€â”€ Metadata Section â”€â”€â”€ */}
      {metadataEntries.length > 0 && (
        <section className="bg-surface border border-border rounded-xl p-4 md:p-5 min-w-0 overflow-hidden">
          <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 mb-4 min-w-0">
            <h3 className="text-sm sm:text-base font-bold text-text-primary truncate">
              Rental Metadata
            </h3>
            <span className="text-text-muted text-[11px] sm:text-xs shrink-0">
              {metadataEntries.length} entries
            </span>
          </div>

          <div className="flex flex-col gap-2 sm:gap-3 min-w-0">
            {metadataEntries.map(([key, value]) => (
              <div
                key={key}
                className="bg-white/[0.03] border border-white/5 rounded-xl p-3 sm:p-4 min-w-0 overflow-hidden"
              >
                <div className="flex items-center justify-between gap-2 min-w-0">
                  <span className="text-sm font-medium text-text-primary truncate">
                    {key.replace(/_/g, " ")}
                  </span>
                  <span className="inline-flex px-2 py-0.5 rounded-md text-[11px] font-semibold border bg-[rgba(108,117,125,0.15)] text-[#6c757d] border-[#6c757d] shrink-0">
                    Meta
                  </span>
                </div>
                <p className="text-xs text-text-secondary break-words mt-1">
                  {formatMetadataValue(value)}
                </p>
              </div>
            ))}
          </div>
        </section>
      )}
    </main>
  );
}

/* â”€â”€â”€ Sub-components â”€â”€â”€ */

function InfoRow({
  label,
  value,
  mono = false,
  breakAll = false,
  highlight = false,
  customColor,
}: {
  label: string;
  value: React.ReactNode;
  mono?: boolean;
  breakAll?: boolean;
  highlight?: boolean;
  customColor?: string;
}) {
  return (
    <div className="flex justify-between items-baseline py-1.5 gap-4">
      <label className="text-text-muted text-xs shrink-0 sm:w-[100px]">
        {label}
      </label>
      <span
        className={`text-xs sm:text-right break-words min-w-0 ${
          breakAll ? "break-all" : ""
        } ${mono ? "font-mono" : ""} ${
          customColor || highlight
            ? `font-semibold ${customColor || "text-accent-light"}`
            : "text-text-primary"
        }`}
      >
        {value}
      </span>
    </div>
  );
}

function TableDivider() {
  return <div className="border-t border-border my-2 sm:my-3" />;
}
```

```text
Output:
"""
Admin Rental Service
============================================================

This module contains service classes for admin rental issue management operations.

Created: 2025-11-06
"""

from typing import Dict, Any
from django.db import transaction
from django.utils import timezone
from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model

from api.common.services.base import BaseService, ServiceException
from api.user.rentals.models import RentalIssue

User = get_user_model()


class AdminRentalService(BaseService):
    """Service for admin rental issue management"""
    
    def get_rental_issues(
        self,
        status: str = None,
        issue_type: str = None,
        search: str = None,
        ordering: str = '-reported_at'
    ):
        """
        Get list of rental issues with filtering
        
        Args:
            status: Filter by status (REPORTED, RESOLVED)
            issue_type: Filter by issue type
            search: Search in description or rental code
            ordering: Order by field
            
        Returns:
            Queryset of rental issues
        """
        queryset = RentalIssue.objects.select_related(
            'rental__user',
            'rental__power_bank',
            'rental__station',
            'rental__return_station'
        )
        
        # Apply filters
        if status:
            queryset = queryset.filter(status=status)
        
        if issue_type:
            queryset = queryset.filter(issue_type=issue_type)
        
        if search:
            from django.db.models import Q
            queryset = queryset.filter(
                Q(description__icontains=search) |
                Q(rental__rental_code__icontains=search)
            )
        
        # Apply ordering
        queryset = queryset.order_by(ordering)
        
        return queryset
    
    def get_rental_issue(self, issue_id: str) -> RentalIssue:
        """
        Get specific rental issue by ID
        
        Args:
            issue_id: Issue ID
            
        Returns:
            RentalIssue instance
            
        Raises:
            ServiceException: If issue not found
        """
        try:
            return RentalIssue.objects.select_related(
                'rental__user',
                'rental__power_bank',
                'rental__station',
                'rental__return_station'
            ).get(id=issue_id)
        except RentalIssue.DoesNotExist:
            raise ServiceException(
                detail="Rental issue not found",
                code="rental_issue_not_found"
            )
    
    @transaction.atomic
    def update_rental_issue_status(
        self,
        issue_id: str,
        status: str,
        admin_user: User,
        notes: str = None,
        request=None
    ) -> RentalIssue:
        """
        Update rental issue status
        
        Args:
            issue_id: Issue ID
            status: New status (REPORTED, RESOLVED)
            admin_user: Admin user making the update
            notes: Optional admin notes
            request: HTTP request for audit logging
            
        Returns:
            Updated RentalIssue instance
            
        Raises:
            ServiceException: If validation fails
        """
        issue = self.get_rental_issue(issue_id)
        
        # Validate status
        valid_statuses = ['REPORTED', 'RESOLVED']
        if status not in valid_statuses:
            raise ServiceException(
                detail=f"Invalid status. Must be one of: {', '.join(valid_statuses)}",
                code="invalid_status"
            )
        
        # Update status
        old_status = issue.status
        issue.status = status
        
        # Set resolved_at if resolved
        if status == 'RESOLVED' and old_status != 'RESOLVED':
            issue.resolved_at = timezone.now()
        
        issue.save(update_fields=['status', 'resolved_at', 'updated_at'])
        
        # Log admin action
        self._log_admin_action(
            admin_user=admin_user,
            action_type='UPDATE_RENTAL_ISSUE_STATUS',
            target_model='RentalIssue',
            target_id=str(issue.id),
            changes={
                'old_status': old_status,
                'new_status': status,
                'rental_code': issue.rental.rental_code,
                'notes': notes
            },
            description=f"Updated rental issue {issue.id} status from {old_status} to {status}",
            request=request
        )
        
        self.log_info(f"Rental issue {issue.id} status updated: {old_status} -> {status}")
        
        # Send notification to user if resolved
        if status == 'RESOLVED':
            self._send_issue_resolved_notification(issue)
        
        return issue
    
    @transaction.atomic
    def delete_rental_issue(
        self,
        issue_id: str,
        admin_user: User,
        request=None
    ) -> Dict[str, str]:
        """
        Delete rental issue (soft delete by marking as resolved)
        
        Args:
            issue_id: Issue ID
            admin_user: Admin user making the deletion
            request: HTTP request for audit logging
            
        Returns:
            Success message dict
            
        Raises:
            ServiceException: If validation fails
        """
        issue = self.get_rental_issue(issue_id)
        
        # Soft delete by marking as resolved
        if issue.status != 'RESOLVED':
            issue.status = 'RESOLVED'
            issue.resolved_at = timezone.now()
            issue.save(update_fields=['status', 'resolved_at', 'updated_at'])
        
        # Log admin action
        self._log_admin_action(
            admin_user=admin_user,
            action_type='DELETE_RENTAL_ISSUE',
            target_model='RentalIssue',
            target_id=str(issue.id),
            changes={
                'rental_code': issue.rental.rental_code,
                'issue_type': issue.issue_type
            },
            description=f"Deleted rental issue {issue.id}",
            request=request
        )
        
        self.log_info(f"Rental issue {issue.id} deleted")
        
        return {"message": "Rental issue deleted successfully"}
    
    def _send_issue_resolved_notification(self, issue: RentalIssue):
        """Send notification to user when issue is resolved"""
        try:
            from api.user.notifications.services import notify
            
            notify(
                issue.rental.user,
                'rental_issue_resolved',
                rental_code=issue.rental.rental_code,
                issue_type=issue.issue_type,
                rental_id=str(issue.rental.id),
                issue_id=str(issue.id)
            )
        except Exception as e:
            self.log_warning(f"Failed to send issue resolved notification: {str(e)}")
    
    def _log_admin_action(
        self,
        admin_user: User,
        action_type: str,
        target_model: str,
        target_id: str,
        changes: dict,
        description: str,
        request=None
    ):
        """Log admin action to audit trail"""
        try:
            from api.admin.models import AdminActionLog
            
            AdminActionLog.objects.create(
                admin_user=admin_user,
                action_type=action_type,
                target_model=target_model,
                target_id=target_id,
                changes=changes,
                description=description,
                ip_address=self._get_client_ip(request) if request else '',
                user_agent=request.META.get('HTTP_USER_AGENT', '') if request else ''
            )
        except Exception as e:
            self.log_error(f"Failed to log admin action: {str(e)}")
    
    def _get_client_ip(self, request) -> str:
        """Get client IP address from request"""
        x_forwarded_for = request.META.get('HTTP_X_FORWARDED_FOR')
        if x_forwarded_for:
            ip = x_forwarded_for.split(',')[0]
        else:
            ip = request.META.get('REMOTE_ADDR')
        return ip
    
    # ============================================================
    # Rental List Methods
    # ============================================================
    
    def get_rentals_list(self, filters: Dict[str, Any] = None) -> Dict[str, Any]:
        """
        Get paginated list of rentals with filters
        
        Args:
            filters: Dictionary containing filter parameters
                - status: Filter by rental status
                - payment_status: Filter by payment status
                - user_id: Filter by user ID
                - station_id: Filter by station ID
                - search: Search by rental code or user name
                - recent: 'today', '24h', '7d', '30d' for recent rentals
                - start_date: Filter rentals started after this date
                - end_date: Filter rentals started before this date
                - page: Page number (default: 1)
                - page_size: Items per page (default: 20)
                
        Returns:
            Dict with results and pagination info
        """
        from api.common.utils.helpers import paginate_queryset
        from datetime import timedelta
        from django.db.models import Q
        
        queryset = self._get_base_rental_queryset()
        
        if filters:
            # Status filter
            if filters.get('status'):
                queryset = queryset.filter(status=filters['status'])
            
            # Payment status filter
            if filters.get('payment_status'):
                queryset = queryset.filter(payment_status=filters['payment_status'])
            
            # User filter
            if filters.get('user_id'):
                queryset = queryset.filter(user_id=filters['user_id'])
            
            # Station filter
            if filters.get('station_id'):
                queryset = queryset.filter(
                    Q(station_id=filters['station_id']) | 
                    Q(return_station_id=filters['station_id'])
                )
            
            # Search filter
            if filters.get('search'):
                search_term = filters['search']
                queryset = queryset.filter(
                    Q(rental_code__icontains=search_term) |
                    Q(user__username__icontains=search_term) |
                    Q(user__phone_number__icontains=search_term)
                )
            
            # Recent rentals filter
            if filters.get('recent'):
                now = timezone.now()
                recent_type = filters['recent']
                
                if recent_type == 'today':
                    queryset = queryset.filter(
                        created_at__date=now.date()
                    )
                elif recent_type == '24h':
                    queryset = queryset.filter(
                        created_at__gte=now - timedelta(hours=24)
                    )
                elif recent_type == '7d':
                    queryset = queryset.filter(
                        created_at__gte=now - timedelta(days=7)
                    )
                elif recent_type == '30d':
                    queryset = queryset.filter(
                        created_at__gte=now - timedelta(days=30)
                    )
            
            # Date range filters
            if filters.get('start_date'):
                queryset = queryset.filter(started_at__gte=filters['start_date'])
            
            if filters.get('end_date'):
                queryset = queryset.filter(started_at__lte=filters['end_date'])
        
        # Order by latest first
        queryset = queryset.order_by('-created_at')
        
        # Pagination
        page = filters.get('page', 1) if filters else 1
        page_size = filters.get('page_size', 20) if filters else 20
        
        return paginate_queryset(queryset, page, page_size)
    
    def get_rental_detail(self, rental_id: str):
        """
        Get detailed rental information
        
        Args:
            rental_id: Rental ID (UUID)
            
        Returns:
            Rental instance with all related data
            
        Raises:
            ServiceException: If rental not found
        """
        from api.user.rentals.models import Rental
        
        try:
            return self._get_base_rental_queryset().get(id=rental_id)
        except Rental.DoesNotExist:
            raise ServiceException(
                detail="Rental not found",
                code="rental_not_found"
            )
    
    def _get_base_rental_queryset(self):
        """Get base queryset with all necessary relationships"""
        from api.user.rentals.models import Rental
        
        return Rental.objects.select_related(
            'user',
            'station',
            'return_station',
            'slot',
            'package',
            'power_bank'
        ).prefetch_related(
            'extensions',
            'issues'
        )

```

```text
import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server";
import axios, { AxiosError } from "axios";

export async function POST(
  request: NextRequest,
  context: { params: Promise<{ rental_id: string }> },
) {
  try {
    const authorization = request.headers.get("Authorization");

    if (!authorization) {
      return NextResponse.json(
        { success: false, message: "Authorization header missing" },
        { status: 401 },
      );
    }

    const { rental_id } = await context.params;
    const payload = await request.json().catch(() => ({}));
    const url = `${process.env.BASE_URL}/admin/rentals/${rental_id}/force-complete`;

    const response = await axios.post(url, payload, {
      headers: {
        Authorization: authorization,
        "Content-Type": "application/json",
      },
    });

    return NextResponse.json(response.data);
  } catch (error: any) {
    const axiosError = error as AxiosError;
    if (axiosError.response) {
      return NextResponse.json(axiosError.response.data, {
        status: axiosError.response.status,
      });
    }
    return NextResponse.json(
      { success: false, message: "Internal server error" },
      { status: 500 },
    );
  }
}

```

```text
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ from django.utils import timezone
 from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model
 
 from api.common.services.base import BaseService, ServiceException
-from api.user.rentals.models import RentalIssue
+from api.user.rentals.models import Rental, RentalIssue
 
 User = get_user_model()
 
@@ -379,6 +379,72 @@ class AdminRentalService(BaseService):
                 detail="Rental not found",
                 code="rental_not_found"
             )
+
+    @transaction.atomic
+    def update_rental_manual_completion(
+        self,
+        rental_id: str,
+        amount,
+        status: str,
+        admin_user: User,
+        request=None
+    ) -> Rental:
+        """
+        Simple admin override to adjust amount and status.
+        Keeps payment as due when rental is completed manually.
+        """
+        rental = self._get_base_rental_queryset().select_for_update().filter(id=rental_id).first()
+        if not rental:
+            raise ServiceException(detail="Rental not found", code="rental_not_found")
+
+        valid_statuses = [choice[0] for choice in Rental.RENTAL_STATUS_CHOICES]
+        if status not in valid_statuses:
+            raise ServiceException(
+                detail=f"Invalid rental status. Must be one of: {', '.join(valid_statuses)}",
+                code="invalid_rental_status"
+            )
+
+        old_status = rental.status
+        old_payment_status = rental.payment_status
+
+        rental.status = status
+        rental.overdue_amount = amount
+        update_fields = ['status', 'overdue_amount', 'updated_at']
+
+        if status == 'COMPLETED':
+            if not rental.ended_at:
+                rental.ended_at = timezone.now()
+                update_fields.append('ended_at')
+            rental.is_returned_on_time = bool(rental.due_at and rental.ended_at and rental.ended_at <= rental.due_at)
+            rental.payment_status = 'PENDING'
+            update_fields.extend(['is_returned_on_time', 'payment_status'])
+
+            rental.rental_metadata = dict(rental.rental_metadata or {})
+            rental.rental_metadata['manual_return_override'] = True
+            rental.rental_metadata['manual_return_override_at'] = timezone.now().isoformat()
+            rental.rental_metadata['manual_return_override_by_admin'] = str(admin_user.id)
+            update_fields.append('rental_metadata')
+
+        rental.save(update_fields=list(dict.fromkeys(update_fields)))
+
+        self._log_admin_action(
+            admin_user=admin_user,
+            action_type='UPDATE_RENTAL_MANUAL_COMPLETION',
+            target_model='Rental',
+            target_id=str(rental.id),
+            changes={
+                'rental_code': rental.rental_code,
+                'old_status': old_status,
+                'new_status': rental.status,
+                'old_payment_status': old_payment_status,
+                'new_payment_status': rental.payment_status,
+                'amount': str(rental.overdue_amount),
+            },
+            description=f"Manual rental update: {rental.rental_code} -> {rental.status}",
+            request=request
+        )
+
+        return rental
     
     def _get_base_rental_queryset(self):
         """Get base queryset with all necessary relationships"""

@@ -244,3 +249,61 @@ class StationSyncMixin:
         except Exception as e:
             self.log_error(f"Error syncing powerbanks for station {station.serial_number}: {str(e)}")
             raise ServiceException(detail=f"Failed to sync powerbanks: {str(e)}", code="powerbanks_sync_error")
+
+    def _reconcile_offline_returns_from_full_sync(self, device_data: Dict[str, Any], powerbanks_data: list) -> int:
+        """
+        Reuse existing return-event logic for powerbanks found in full sync payload.
+        """
+        from api.user.rentals.models import Rental
+
+        if not powerbanks_data:
+            return 0
+
+        candidate_serials = []
+        for pb_info in powerbanks_data:
+            pb_serial = str(pb_info.get('serial_number') or '').strip()
+            slot_number = pb_info.get('current_slot')
+            if pb_serial and slot_number:
+                candidate_serials.append(pb_serial)
+
+        if not candidate_serials:
+            return 0
+
+        active_rented_serials = set(
+            Rental.objects.filter(
+                status__in=['ACTIVE', 'OVERDUE'],
+                power_bank__serial_number__in=candidate_serials
+            ).values_list('power_bank__serial_number', flat=True)
+        )
+
+        if not active_rented_serials:
+            return 0
+
+        processed = 0
+        already_processed = set()
+
+        for pb_info in powerbanks_data:
+            pb_serial = str(pb_info.get('serial_number') or '').strip()
+            slot_number = pb_info.get('current_slot')
+
+            if not pb_serial or not slot_number:
+                continue
+            if pb_serial not in active_rented_serials:
+                continue
+            if pb_serial in already_processed:
+                continue
+
+            return_payload = {
+                'device': device_data,
+                'return_event': {
+                    'power_bank_serial': pb_serial,
+                    'slot_number': slot_number,
+                    'battery_level': pb_info.get('battery_level', 0),
+                }
+            }
+
+            self.process_return_event(return_payload)
+            processed += 1
+            already_processed.add(pb_serial)
+
+        return processed

```

```text
+    rental?.payment_status === "PENDING" &&

+    );

+            status: statusInput.toUpperCase(),

+        },

+      if (!response.ok || !data.success) {
+        const errorMessage =
+          data?.error?.message || data?.message || "Failed to force complete rental";
+        throw new Error(errorMessage);
+      }
+
+      toast.success("Rental updated successfully");
+      await fetchRentalDetail();
+    } catch (err: any) {
+      const message =
+        err?.message || "Failed to force complete rental";
+      toast.error(message);
+    } finally {
+      setForceCompleting(false);
+    }
+  };
 
   if (loading) {
     return (
```

```text
"""
Signature generation and validation for IoT system integration
Uses HMAC-SHA256 algorithm matching Java implementation
"""
from __future__ import annotations

import hmac
import hashlib
import base64
import time
from typing import Tuple
from django.conf import settings

from api.common.services.base import BaseService


class SignChargeGharMain(BaseService):
    """HMAC-SHA256 signature utilities for ChargeGhar IoT integration"""
    
    def __init__(self, secret_key: str = None):
        """
        Initialize with secret key
        
        Args:
            secret_key: Shared secret for HMAC. If None, uses Django settings
        """
        super().__init__()
        self.secret_key = secret_key or getattr(settings, 'IOT_SYSTEM_SIGNATURE_SECRET', None)
        
        if not self.secret_key:
            raise ValueError("IOT_SYSTEM_SIGNATURE_SECRET not configured in settings")
    
    def generate_signature(self, payload: str, timestamp: int) -> str:
        """
        Generate HMAC-SHA256 signature for request
        
        Args:
            payload: JSON request body as string
            timestamp: Unix timestamp in seconds
            
        Returns:
            Base64 encoded signature string
        """
        try:
            if not payload:
                raise ValueError("Payload cannot be empty")
            
            if not isinstance(timestamp, int) or timestamp <= 0:
                raise ValueError("Timestamp must be a positive integer")
            
            message = f"{payload}{timestamp}"
            
            signature = hmac.new(
                key=self.secret_key.encode('utf-8'),
                msg=message.encode('utf-8'),
                digestmod=hashlib.sha256
            ).digest()
            
            encoded_signature = base64.b64encode(signature).decode('utf-8')
            
            self.log_info(f"Generated signature for payload length: {len(payload)}, timestamp: {timestamp}")
            return encoded_signature
            
        except Exception as e:
            self.log_error(f"Error generating signature: {str(e)}")
            raise ValueError(f"Signature generation failed: {str(e)}")
    
    def validate_signature(
        self, 
        payload: str, 
        timestamp: int, 
        received_signature: str,
        time_tolerance: int = 300
    ) -> Tuple[bool, str]:
        """
        Validate signature from request
        
        Args:
            payload: JSON request body as string
            timestamp: Timestamp from request header
            received_signature: Signature from X-Signature header
            time_tolerance: Maximum age of request in seconds (default 300s = 5min)
            
        Returns:
            Tuple of (is_valid: bool, error_message: str)
        """
        try:
            if not payload:
                return False, "Payload cannot be empty"
            
            if not received_signature:
                return False, "Signature cannot be empty"
            
            if not isinstance(timestamp, int):
                return False, "Timestamp must be an integer"
            
            # Check timestamp freshness
            current_time = int(time.time())
            time_diff = abs(current_time - timestamp)
            
            if time_diff > time_tolerance:
                self.log_warning(f"Request timestamp too old: {time_diff}s > {time_tolerance}s allowed")
                return False, f"Request timestamp too old ({time_diff}s > {time_tolerance}s allowed)"
            
            # Compute expected signature
            try:
                expected_signature = self.generate_signature(payload, timestamp)
            except Exception as e:
                self.log_error(f"Error computing expected signature: {str(e)}")
                return False, f"Signature generation error: {str(e)}"
            
            # Compare signatures (timing-safe comparison)
            if not hmac.compare_digest(expected_signature, received_signature):
                self.log_warning(f"Signature mismatch for timestamp {timestamp}")
                return False, "Signature mismatch"
            
            self.log_info(f"Signature validation successful for timestamp {timestamp}")
            return True, ""
            
        except Exception as e:
            self.log_error(f"Error validating signature: {str(e)}")
            return False, f"Signature validation error: {str(e)}"
    
    @staticmethod
    def get_current_timestamp() -> int:
        """Get current Unix timestamp in seconds"""
        return int(time.time())


# Singleton instance
_signature_util = None


def get_signature_util() -> SignChargeGharMain:
    """Get singleton signature utility instance"""
    global _signature_util
    if _signature_util is None:
        _signature_util = SignChargeGharMain()
    return _signature_util

```

Raw: $loginRaw\" }\n\n$timestamp = [int][DateTimeOffset]::UtcNow.ToUnixTimeSeconds()\n$payloadObj = [ordered]@{\n  type = 'full'\n  timestamp = $timestamp\n  device = [ordered]@{\n    serial_number = $stationImei\n    imei = $stationImei\n    status = 'ONLINE'\n    last_heartbeat = [DateTime]::UtcNow.ToString('o')\n    hardware_info = [ordered]@{ firmware_version = '2.1.5' }\n  }\n  station = [ordered]@{ total_slots = 8 }\n  slots = @(\n    [ordered]@{ slot_number = 1; status = 'OCCUPIED'; battery_level = 0; slot_metadata = @{} },\n    [ordered]@{ slot_number = 2; status = 'OCCUPIED'; battery_level = 68; power_bank_serial = $powerbankSerial; slot_metadata = @{} }\n  )\n  power_banks = @(\n    [ordered]@{\n      serial_number = $powerbankSerial\n      status = 'AVAILABLE'\n      battery_level = 68\n      current_slot = 2\n      hardware_info = [ordered]@{ temperature = 30; voltage = 5000 }\n    }\n  )\n}\n$payload = $payloadObj | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 -Compress\n\n$hmac = [System.Security.Cryptography.HMACSHA256]::new([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($secret))\n$message = \"$payload$timestamp\"\n$signature = [Convert]::ToBase64String($hmac.ComputeHash([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($message)))\n\n$syncRaw = curl.exe -sS -X POST \"http://localhost:8010/api/internal/stations/data\" -H \"accept: application/json\" -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\" -H \"X-Signature: $signature\" -H \"X-Timestamp: $timestamp\" -d $payload\n$detailRaw = curl.exe -sS -X GET \"http://localhost:8010/api/admin/rentals/$rentalId\" -H \"accept: application/json\" -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\"\n\n\"LOGIN_OK user_id=$($login.data.user_id)\"\n\"SYNC_RESPONSE=$syncRaw\"\n\"RENTAL_DETAIL=$detailRaw\"","workdir":"e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend","timeout_ms":120000}

```json
{"command":"@'\nfrom django.contrib.auth import get_user_model\nfrom django.utils import timezone\nfrom datetime import timedelta\nfrom api.user.stations.models import Station, StationSlot, PowerBank\nfrom api.user.rentals.models import RentalPackage, Rental\n\nUser = get_user_model()\nuser = User.objects.filter(is_superuser=True).first() or User.objects.first()\nif not user:\n    raise SystemExit('No user found in DB')\n\nsuffix = timezone.now().strftime('%Y%m%d%H%M%S')\nstation_imei = f'OFFSYNC2-IMEI-{suffix}'\nstation_sn = f'OFFSYNC2-SN-{suffix}'\npb_serial = f'OFF2PB{suffix[-8:]}'\nrental_code = f'R{suffix[-9:]}'\n\nstation = Station.objects.create(\n    station_name=f'Offline Sync2 Test {suffix[-4:]}',\n    serial_number=station_sn,\n    imei=station_imei,\n    latitude='27.700000000000000',\n    longitude='85.300000000000000',\n    address='Test Address Kathmandu',\n    total_slots=8,\n    status='ONLINE',\n    hardware_info={},\n    last_heartbeat=timezone.now(),\n)\n\nslot1 = StationSlot.objects.create(station=station, slot_number=1, status='OCCUPIED', battery_level=0, slot_metadata={})\nslot2 = StationSlot.objects.create(station=station, slot_number=2, status='AVAILABLE', battery_level=0, slot_metadata={})\n\npowerbank = PowerBank.objects.create(\n    serial_number=pb_serial,\n    model='Standard',\n    capacity_mah=10000,\n    status='RENTED',\n    battery_level=74,\n    hardware_info={},\n    current_station=None,\n    current_slot=None,\n)\n\npackage = RentalPackage.objects.filter(is_active=True).order_by('id').first()\nif not package:\n    package = RentalPackage.objects.create(\n        name='Test Package',\n        description='Test package for offline sync scenario',\n        duration_minutes=60,\n        price='100.00',\n        package_type='HOURLY',\n        payment_model='PREPAID',\n        is_active=True,\n        package_metadata={}\n    )\n\nrental = Rental.objects.create(\n    user=user,\n    station=station,\n    slot=slot1,\n    package=package,\n    power_bank=powerbank,\n    rental_code=rental_code,\n    status='ACTIVE',\n    payment_status='PAID',\n    started_at=timezone.now() - timedelta(minutes=10),\n    due_at=timezone.now() + timedelta(minutes=50),\n    amount_paid=package.price,\n    overdue_amount='0.00',\n    rental_metadata={'scenario': 'offline_return_sync_test_2'}\n)\nslot1.current_rental = rental\nslot1.save(update_fields=['current_rental', 'last_updated'])\n\nprint('SETUP2_OK')\nprint(f'station_imei={station.imei}')\nprint(f'powerbank_serial={powerbank.serial_number}')\nprint(f'rental_id={rental.id}')\nprint(f'rental_code={rental.rental_code}')\n'@ | docker exec -i cg-api-local sh -lc \"uv run manage.py shell\"","workdir":"e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend","timeout_ms":120000}
```

```json
{"command":"$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n$stationImei = 'OFFSYNC2-IMEI-20260503141407'\n$powerbankSerial = 'OFF2PB03141407'\n$rentalId = '715ae63c-c94d-4e9f-a2b3-ef7fb0251dc3'\n$secret = 'ChargeGhar-SystemSecret-TrustKey2025!'\n$payloadFile = Join-Path $env:TEMP 'offline_sync_payload2.json'\n\n$loginRaw = curl.exe -sS -X POST \"http://localhost:8010/api/admin/login\" -H \"accept: application/json\" -H \"Content-Type: multipart/form-data\" -F \"email=janak@powerbank.com\" -F \"password=5060\"\n$login = $loginRaw | ConvertFrom-Json\n$token = $login.data.access_token\nif (-not $token) { throw \"Admin login failed. Raw: $loginRaw\" }\n\n$timestamp = [int][DateTimeOffset]::UtcNow.ToUnixTimeSeconds()\n$payloadObj = [ordered]@{\n  type = 'full'\n  timestamp = $timestamp\n  device = [ordered]@{\n    serial_number = $stationImei\n    imei = $stationImei\n    status = 'ONLINE'\n    last_heartbeat = [DateTime]::UtcNow.ToString('o')\n    hardware_info = [ordered]@{ firmware_version = '2.1.5' }\n  }\n  station = [ordered]@{ total_slots = 8 }\n  slots = @(\n    [ordered]@{ slot_number = 1; status = 'OCCUPIED'; battery_level = 0; slot_metadata = @{} },\n    [ordered]@{ slot_number = 2; status = 'OCCUPIED'; battery_level = 69; power_bank_serial = $powerbankSerial; slot_metadata = @{} }\n  )\n  power_banks = @(\n    [ordered]@{\n      serial_number = $powerbankSerial\n      status = 'AVAILABLE'\n      battery_level = 69\n      current_slot = 2\n      hardware_info = [ordered]@{ temperature = 31; voltage = 5000 }\n    }\n  )\n}\n$payload = $payloadObj | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20 -Compress\n$utf8NoBom = [System.Text.UTF8Encoding]::new($false)\n[System.IO.File]::WriteAllText($payloadFile, $payload, $utf8NoBom)\n$payloadExact = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllText($payloadFile, $utf8NoBom)\n\n$hmac = [System.Security.Cryptography.HMACSHA256]::new([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($secret))\n$message = \"$payloadExact$timestamp\"\n$signature = [Convert]::ToBase64String($hmac.ComputeHash([Text.Encoding]::UTF8.GetBytes($message)))\n\n$syncRaw = curl.exe -sS -X POST \"http://localhost:8010/api/internal/stations/data\" -H \"accept: application/json\" -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\" -H \"X-Signature: $signature\" -H \"X-Timestamp: $timestamp\" --data-binary \"@$payloadFile\"\n$detailRaw = curl.exe -sS -X GET \"http://localhost:8010/api/admin/rentals/$rentalId\" -H \"accept: application/json\" -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\"\n\n\"SYNC_RESPONSE=$syncRaw\"\n\"RENTAL_DETAIL=$detailRaw\"","workdir":"e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend","timeout_ms":120000}
```

```text
         except Exception as e:
             self.log_error(f"Error syncing powerbanks for station {station.serial_number}: {str(e)}")
             raise ServiceException(detail=f"Failed to sync powerbanks: {str(e)}", code="powerbanks_sync_error")
+
+    def _reconcile_offline_returns_from_full_sync(self, device_data: Dict[str, Any], powerbanks_data: list) -> int:
+        """
+        Reuse existing return-event logic for powerbanks found in full sync payload.
+        """
+        from api.user.rentals.models import Rental
+
+        if not powerbanks_data:
+            return 0
+
+        candidate_serials = []
+        for pb_info in powerbanks_data:
+            pb_serial = str(pb_info.get('serial_number') or '').strip()
+            slot_number = pb_info.get('current_slot')
+            if pb_serial and slot_number:
+                candidate_serials.append(pb_serial)
+
+        if not candidate_serials:
+            return 0
+
+        active_rented_serials = set(
+            Rental.objects.filter(
+                status__in=['ACTIVE', 'OVERDUE'],
+                power_bank__serial_number__in=candidate_serials
+            ).values_list('power_bank__serial_number', flat=True)
+        )
+
+        if not active_rented_serials:
+            return 0
+
+        processed = 0
+        already_processed = set()
+
+        for pb_info in powerbanks_data:
+            pb_serial = str(pb_info.get('serial_number') or '').strip()
+            slot_number = pb_info.get('current_slot')
+
+            if not pb_serial or not slot_number:
+                continue
+            if pb_serial not in active_rented_serials:
+                continue
+            if pb_serial in already_processed:
+                continue
+
+            return_payload = {
+                'device': device_data,
+                'return_event': {
+                    'power_bank_serial': pb_serial,
+                    'slot_number': slot_number,
+                    'battery_level': pb_info.get('battery_level', 0),
+                }
+            }
+
+            self.process_return_event(return_payload)
+            processed += 1
+            already_processed.add(pb_serial)
+
+        return processed

```

```text
+@extend_schema(
+    tags=["Admin - Rentals"],
+    summary="Manual Rental Update",

+    responses={200: BaseResponseSerializer}
+)
+class AdminRentalForceCompleteView(GenericAPIView, BaseAPIView):
+    permission_classes = [IsStaffPermission]
+    serializer_class = AdminRentalManualUpdateSerializer
+
+    @log_api_call(include_request_data=True)
+    def post(self, request: Request, rental_id: str) -> Response:
+        """Manually update rental status and amount"""
+        def operation():
+            serializer = self.get_serializer(data=request.data)
+            serializer.is_valid(raise_exception=True)
+
+            service = AdminRentalService()
+            rental = service.update_rental_manual_completion(
+                rental_id=rental_id,
+                amount=serializer.validated_data['amount'],
+                status=serializer.validated_data['status'],
+                admin_user=request.user,
+                request=request
+            )
+
+            return serializers.AdminRentalDetailSerializer(rental).data
+
+        return self.handle_service_operation(
+            operation,
+            "Rental updated successfully",
+            "Failed to update rental"
+        )
+
```

```text
diff --git a/api/admin/services/admin_rental_service.py b/api/admin/services/admin_rental_service.py
index d95d78f..e71dea8 100644
--- a/api/admin/services/admin_rental_service.py
+++ b/api/admin/services/admin_rental_service.py
@@ -13,7 +13,7 @@ from django.utils import timezone
 from django.contrib.auth import get_user_model
 
 from api.common.services.base import BaseService, ServiceException
-from api.user.rentals.models import RentalIssue
+from api.user.rentals.models import Rental, RentalIssue
 
 User = get_user_model()
 
@@ -379,6 +379,73 @@ class AdminRentalService(BaseService):
                 detail="Rental not found",
                 code="rental_not_found"
             )
+
+    @transaction.atomic
+    def update_rental_manual_completion(
+        self,
+        rental_id: str,
+        amount,
+        status: str,
+        admin_user: User,
+        request=None
+    ) -> Rental:
+        """
+        Simple admin override to adjust amount and status.
+        Keeps payment as due when rental is completed manually.
+        """
+        rental = Rental.objects.select_for_update().filter(id=rental_id).first()
+        if not rental:
+            raise ServiceException(detail="Rental not found", code="rental_not_found")
+
+        normalized_status = str(status or '').strip().upper()
+        valid_statuses = [choice[0] for choice in Rental.RENTAL_STATUS_CHOICES]
+        if normalized_status not in valid_statuses:
+            raise ServiceException(
+                detail=f"Invalid rental status. Must be one of: {', '.join(valid_statuses)}",
+                code="invalid_rental_status"
+            )
+
+        old_status = rental.status
+        old_payment_status = rental.payment_status
+
+        rental.status = normalized_status
+        rental.overdue_amount = amount
+        update_fields = ['status', 'overdue_amount', 'updated_at']
+
+        if normalized_status == 'COMPLETED':
+            if not rental.ended_at:
+                rental.ended_at = timezone.now()
+                update_fields.append('ended_at')
+            rental.is_returned_on_time = bool(rental.due_at and rental.ended_at and rental.ended_at <= rental.due_at)
+            rental.payment_status = 'PENDING'
+            update_fields.extend(['is_returned_on_time', 'payment_status'])
+
+            rental.rental_metadata = dict(rental.rental_metadata or {})
+            rental.rental_metadata['manual_return_override'] = True
+            rental.rental_metadata['manual_return_override_at'] = timezone.now().isoformat()
+            rental.rental_metadata['manual_return_override_by_admin'] = str(admin_user.id)
+            update_fields.append('rental_metadata')
+
+        rental.save(update_fields=list(dict.fromkeys(update_fields)))
+
+        self._log_admin_action(
+            admin_user=admin_user,
+            action_type='UPDATE_RENTAL_MANUAL_COMPLETION',
+            target_model='Rental',
+            target_id=str(rental.id),
+            changes={
+                'rental_code': rental.rental_code,
+                'old_status': old_status,
+                'new_status': rental.status,
+                'old_payment_status': old_payment_status,
+                'new_payment_status': rental.payment_status,
+                'amount': str(rental.overdue_amount),
+            },
+            description=f"Manual rental update: {rental.rental_code} -> {rental.status}",
+            request=request
+        )
+
+        return rental
     
     def _get_base_rental_queryset(self):
         """Get base queryset with all necessary relationships"""
```

```text
   const overdueValue = parseFloat(rental?.overdue_amount || "0");
   const paidValue = parseFloat(rental?.amount_paid || "0");

+  const canForceComplete = Boolean(rental);
+
+  const handleForceComplete = async () => {
+    if (!rental || !canForceComplete || forceCompleting) return;
+
+    const statusInput = window.prompt(
+      "Enter rental status (example: COMPLETED)",
+      "COMPLETED",
+    );
+    if (!statusInput) return;
+
+    const amountInput = window.prompt(
+      "Enter due amount",
+      rental.overdue_amount || "0",
+    );
+    if (amountInput === null) return;
+
+    const parsedAmount = Number(amountInput);
+    if (Number.isNaN(parsedAmount) || parsedAmount < 0) {
+      toast.error("Please enter a valid non-negative amount");
+      return;
+    }
+
+    const confirmed = window.confirm(
+      `Update rental ${rental.rental_code} to status ${statusInput.toUpperCase()} with amount ${parsedAmount}?`,
+    );
+    if (!confirmed) return;
+
+    try {
+      setForceCompleting(true);
+      const token = localStorage.getItem("accessToken");
+      const response = await fetch(
+        `/api/admin/rentals/${rental_id}/force-complete`,
+        {
+          method: "POST",
+          headers: {
+            Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`,
+            "Content-Type": "application/json",
+          },
+          body: JSON.stringify({
+            amount: parsedAmount,
+            status: statusInput.toUpperCase(),
+          }),
+        },
+      );
+
+      const data = await response.json();
+      if (!response.ok || !data.success) {
+        const errorMessage =
+          data?.error?.message || data?.message || "Failed to force complete rental";
+        throw new Error(errorMessage);
+      }
+
+      toast.success("Rental updated successfully");
+      await fetchRentalDetail();
+    } catch (err: any) {
+      const message =
+        err?.message || "Failed to force complete rental";
+      toast.error(message);
+    } finally {
+      setForceCompleting(false);
+    }
+  };
 
   if (loading) {
     return (
@@ -271,6 +334,22 @@ export default function RentalDetailPage({
```

```text
26:\t      },
```
