```text
1:\tfrom django.db import models
2:\tfrom api.common.models import BaseModel
3:\tfrom .station import Station
4:\tfrom .slot import StationSlot
5:\t
6:\t
7:\tclass PowerBank(BaseModel):
8:\t    """
9:\t    PowerBank - Physical power bank device
10:\t    """
11:\t    POWERBANK_STATUS_CHOICES = [
12:\t        ('AVAILABLE', 'Available'),
13:\t        ('RENTED', 'Rented'),
14:\t        ('MAINTENANCE', 'Maintenance'),
15:\t        ('DAMAGED', 'Damaged'),
16:\t    ]
17:\t
18:\t    serial_number = models.CharField(max_length=255, unique=True)
19:\t    model = models.CharField(max_length=255)
20:\t    capacity_mah = models.IntegerField()
21:\t    status = models.CharField(max_length=50, choices=POWERBANK_STATUS_CHOICES, default='AVAILABLE')
22:\t    battery_level = models.IntegerField(default=100)
23:\t    hardware_info = models.JSONField(default=dict)
24:\t    last_updated = models.DateTimeField(auto_now=True)
25:\t
26:\t    # Battery lifecycle stats
27:\t    total_cycles = models.DecimalField(max_digits=8, decimal_places=4, default=0)
28:\t    total_rentals = models.IntegerField(default=0)
29:\t    
30:\t    current_station = models.ForeignKey(Station, on_delete=models.SET_NULL, null=True, blank=True)
31:\t    current_slot = models.ForeignKey(StationSlot, on_delete=models.SET_NULL, null=True, blank=True)
32:\t
33:\t    class Meta:
34:\t        db_table = "power_banks"
35:\t        verbose_name = "Power Bank"
36:\t        verbose_name_plural = "Power Banks"
37:\t
38:\t    def __str__(self):
39:\t        return f"PowerBank {self.serial_number}"
40:\t    
41:\t    def update_battery_cycle(self, start_level: int, end_level: int, rental=None):
42:\t        """
43:\t        Update battery cycle stats and create log.
44:\t        
45:\t        Args:
46:\t            start_level: Battery level at rental start (0-100)
47:\t            end_level: Battery level at rental return (0-100)
48:\t            rental: Rental instance (optional, for logging)
49:\t        
50:\t        Returns:
51:\t            cycle_contribution: Decimal cycles added
52:\t        """
53:\t        from decimal import Decimal
54:\t        from api.user.rentals.models import BatteryCycleLog
55:\t        
56:\t        discharge = max(0, start_level - end_level)
57:\t        if discharge == 0:
58:\t            return Decimal('0.0000')
59:\t        
60:\t        cycle_contribution = (Decimal(discharge) / Decimal(100)).quantize(Decimal('0.0001'))
61:\t        
62:\t        # Create detailed log
63:\t        BatteryCycleLog.objects.create(
64:\t            powerbank=self,
65:\t            rental=rental,
66:\t            start_level=start_level,
67:\t            end_level=end_level,
68:\t            discharge_percent=Decimal(discharge),
69:\t            cycle_contribution=cycle_contribution
70:\t        )
71:\t        
72:\t        # Update cumulative stats
73:\t        self.total_cycles += cycle_contribution
74:\t        self.total_rentals += 1
75:\t        self.save(update_fields=['total_cycles', 'total_rentals', 'updated_at'])
76:\t        
77:\t        return cycle_contribution
78:\t    
79:\t    def get_lifecycle_stats(self):
80:\t        """
81:\t        Get battery lifecycle statistics.
82:\t        
83:\t        Returns:
84:\t            dict: Lifecycle stats including total cycles, rentals, and averages
85:\t        """
86:\t        from decimal import Decimal
87:\t        from django.db.models import Sum, Avg, Count
88:\t        
89:\t        stats = self.cycle_logs.aggregate(
90:\t            total_discharge=Sum('discharge_percent'),
91:\t            avg_discharge=Avg('discharge_percent'),
92:\t            log_count=Count('id')
93:\t        )
94:\t        
95:\t        avg_cycles_per_rental = (
96:\t            (self.total_cycles / Decimal(self.total_rentals))
97:\t            if self.total_rentals > 0 
98:\t            else Decimal('0')
99:\t        )
100:\t        
101:\t        return {
102:\t            'total_cycles': self.total_cycles,
103:\t            'total_rentals': self.total_rentals,
104:\t            'avg_cycles_per_rental': avg_cycles_per_rental,
105:\t            'total_discharge_percent': stats['total_discharge'] or Decimal('0'),
106:\t            'avg_discharge_per_rental': stats['avg_discharge'] or Decimal('0'),
107:\t            'cycle_log_count': stats['log_count'] or 0
108:\t        }
109:\t    
110:\t    def get_recent_cycle_logs(self, limit=10):
111:\t        """
112:\t        Get recent battery cycle logs.
113:\t        
114:\t        Args:
115:\t            limit: Number of recent logs to return (default: 10)
116:\t        
117:\t        Returns:
118:\t            QuerySet: Recent BatteryCycleLog instances
119:\t        """
120:\t        return self.cycle_logs.select_related('rental').order_by('-created_at')[:limit]

```

```text
5:\tclass Rental(BaseModel):

9:\t    RENTAL_STATUS_CHOICES = [
10:\t        ('PENDING', 'Pending'),

12:\t        ('ACTIVE', 'Active'),

15:\t        ('OVERDUE', 'Overdue'),

21:\t        ('FAILED', 'Failed'),
22:\t        ('REFUNDED', 'Refunded'),
23:\t    ]
24:\t
25:\t    user = models.ForeignKey('users.User', on_delete=models.CASCADE, related_name='rentals')
26:\t    station = models.ForeignKey('stations.Station', on_delete=models.CASCADE, related_name='rentals')
27:\t    return_station = models.ForeignKey('stations.Station', on_delete=models.CASCADE, null=True, blank=True, related_name='returned_rentals')
28:\t    slot = models.ForeignKey('stations.StationSlot', on_delete=models.CASCADE)
29:\t    package = models.ForeignKey('RentalPackage', on_delete=models.CASCADE)
30:\t    power_bank = models.ForeignKey('stations.PowerBank', on_delete=models.CASCADE, null=True, blank=True)
31:\t    
32:\t    rental_code = models.CharField(max_length=10, unique=True)
33:\t    status = models.CharField(max_length=50, choices=RENTAL_STATUS_CHOICES, default='PENDING')
34:\t    payment_status = models.CharField(max_length=50, choices=PAYMENT_STATUS_CHOICES, default='PENDING')
35:\t    
36:\t    started_at = models.DateTimeField(null=True, blank=True)
37:\t    ended_at = models.DateTimeField(null=True, blank=True)
38:\t    due_at = models.DateTimeField()
39:\t    
40:\t    amount_paid = models.DecimalField(max_digits=10, decimal_places=2, default=0)
41:\t    overdue_amount = models.DecimalField(max_digits=10, decimal_places=2, default=0)
42:\t    
43:\t    is_returned_on_time = models.BooleanField(default=False)
44:\t    timely_return_bonus_awarded = models.BooleanField(default=False)
45:\t    rental_metadata = models.JSONField(default=dict)
46:\t
47:\t    # Battery lifecycle tracking
48:\t    start_battery_level = models.IntegerField(null=True, blank=True)
49:\t    return_battery_level = models.IntegerField(null=True, blank=True)
50:\t    is_under_5_min = models.BooleanField(default=False)
51:\t    hardware_issue_reported = models.BooleanField(default=False)
52:\t
53:\t    class Meta:
54:\t        db_table = "rentals"
55:\t        verbose_name = "Rental"
56:\t        verbose_name_plural = "Rentals"
57:\t    
58:\t    @property
59:\t    def current_overdue_amount(self):
60:\t        """
61:\t        Calculate REALTIME overdue amount for active/overdue rentals.
62:\t        Returns the live, current late fee if rental is still ongoing.
63:\t        For completed rentals, returns the stored final amount.
64:\t        """
65:\t        from decimal import Decimal
66:\t        from django.utils import timezone
67:\t
68:\t        # Rental never started: no realtime overdue should accrue.
69:\t        if not self.started_at:
70:\t            return Decimal('0')
71:\t        
72:\t        # If already returned, use stored final amount
73:\t        if self.ended_at:
74:\t            return self.overdue_amount
75:\t        
76:\t        # If not overdue yet, return 0
77:\t        if not self.due_at or timezone.now() <= self.due_at:
78:\t            return Decimal('0')
79:\t        
80:\t        # Calculate REALTIME late fee using current time
81:\t        from api.user.rentals.services.late_fee_service import LateFeeService
82:\t        
83:\t        # Use current time as hypothetical end time
84:\t        hypothetical_end = timezone.now()
85:\t        overdue_duration = hypothetical_end - self.due_at
86:\t        overdue_minutes = int(overdue_duration.total_seconds() / 60)
87:\t        
88:\t        # Get active config (cached) or fall back to simple calculation
89:\t        config = LateFeeService.get_active_configuration()
90:\t        normal_rate = self.package.price / (self.package.duration_minutes or 1)
91:\t
92:\t        if not config:
93:\t            return LateFeeService.calculate_late_fee(None, normal_rate, overdue_minutes)
94:\t
95:\t        return LateFeeService.calculate_late_fee(config, normal_rate, overdue_minutes)
96:\t    
97:\t    @property
98:\t    def estimated_total_cost(self):
99:\t        """
100:\t        Calculate total estimated cost including current late fees.
101:\t        For active/overdue rentals, this updates in realtime.
102:\t        """
103:\t        return self.amount_paid + self.current_overdue_amount
104:\t    
105:\t    @property
106:\t    def minutes_overdue(self):
107:\t        """
108:\t        Calculate how many minutes the rental is currently overdue.
109:\t        Returns 0 if not overdue yet or already returned.
110:\t        """
111:\t        from django.utils import timezone
112:\t
113:\t        # Rental never started: no overdue duration.
114:\t        if not self.started_at:
115:\t            return 0
116:\t        
117:\t        if not self.due_at:
118:\t            return 0
119:\t        
120:\t        # Use ended_at if returned, otherwise use current time
121:\t        end_time = self.ended_at if self.ended_at else timezone.now()
122:\t        
123:\t        if end_time <= self.due_at:
124:\t            return 0
125:\t        
126:\t        overdue_duration = end_time - self.due_at
127:\t        return int(overdue_duration.total_seconds() / 60)
128:\t
129:\t    def __str__(self):
130:\t        return f"{self.rental_code} - {self.user.username}"
131:\t
132:\t
133:\tclass RentalExtension(BaseModel):
134:\t    """
135:\t    RentalExtension - Extension of rental duration
136:\t    """
137:\t    rental = models.ForeignKey(Rental, on_delete=models.CASCADE, related_name='extensions')
138:\t    package = models.ForeignKey('RentalPackage', on_delete=models.CASCADE)
139:\t    created_by = models.ForeignKey('users.User', on_delete=models.CASCADE)
140:\t

142:\t    extension_cost = models.DecimalField(max_digits=10, decimal_places=2)
143:\t    extended_at = models.DateTimeField(auto_now_add=True)
144:\t
145:\t    class Meta:

147:\t        verbose_name = "Rental Extension"
148:\t        verbose_name_plural = "Rental Extensions"
149:\t
150:\t    def __str__(self):
151:\t        return f"{self.rental.rental_code} - {self.extended_minutes}min"
152:\t

160:\t        ('POWER_BANK_LOST', 'Power Bank Lost'),

163:\t    ]

165:\t    STATUS_CHOICES = [

167:\t        ('RESOLVED', 'Resolved'),
168:\t    ]
169:\t
170:\t    rental = models.ForeignKey(Rental, on_delete=models.CASCADE, related_name='issues')
171:\t    issue_type = models.CharField(max_length=50, choices=ISSUE_TYPE_CHOICES)
172:\t    description = models.CharField(max_length=255)
```

```text
1:\t"""
2:\tStation sync mixin - handles full station synchronization
3:\t"""
4:\tfrom __future__ import annotations

6:\tfrom typing import Dict, Any

8:\tfrom django.utils import timezone
9:\tfrom django.utils.dateparse import parse_datetime

13:\tfrom api.common.services.base import ServiceException
14:\tfrom api.user.stations.models import Station, StationSlot, PowerBank
15:\tfrom api.internal.services.iot_sync_log_service import IoTSyncLogService
16:\t
17:\t
18:\tclass StationSyncMixin:
19:\t    """Mixin for full station synchronization operations"""
20:\t    
21:\t    @transaction.atomic
22:\t    def sync_station_data(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
23:\t        """
24:\t        Sync complete station data (full sync)
25:\t        
26:\t        Args:
27:\t            data: Full data payload from IoT system
28:\t            
29:\t        Returns:
30:\t            Summary of sync operation
31:\t        """
32:\t        start_time = time.time()
33:\t        station = None
34:\t        log_status = 'SUCCESS'
35:\t        error_message = None
36:\t        result = {}
37:\t        
38:\t        try:
39:\t            self._validate_sync_data(data)
40:\t            
41:\t            device_data = data.get('device', {})
42:\t            station_data = data.get('station', {})
43:\t            slots_data = data.get('slots', [])
44:\t            powerbanks_data = data.get('power_banks', [])
45:\t            
46:\t            station_identifier = self._resolve_station_imei(device_data)
47:\t            
48:\t            station = self._sync_station(device_data, station_data)
49:\t            slots_updated = self._sync_slots(station, slots_data)
50:\t            powerbanks_updated = self._sync_powerbanks(station, powerbanks_data)
51:\t            offline_returns_processed = self._reconcile_offline_returns_from_full_sync(
52:\t                device_data=device_data,
53:\t                powerbanks_data=powerbanks_data
54:\t            )
55:\t            
56:\t            # Track status change
57:\t            new_status = self.STATION_STATUS_MAP.get(device_data.get('status', 'OFFLINE'), 'OFFLINE')
58:\t            IoTSyncLogService.track_status_change(station, new_status, 'SYNC')
59:\t            
60:\t            result = {
61:\t                'station_id': str(station.id),
62:\t                'station_serial': station.serial_number,
63:\t                'slots_updated': slots_updated,
64:\t                'powerbanks_updated': powerbanks_updated,
65:\t                'offline_returns_processed': offline_returns_processed,
66:\t                'timestamp': timezone.now().isoformat()
67:\t            }
68:\t            
69:\t            self.log_info(
70:\t                f"Station sync completed for {station_identifier}: {slots_updated} slots, {powerbanks_updated} powerbanks"
71:\t            )
72:\t            return result
73:\t            
74:\t        except ServiceException as e:
75:\t            log_status = 'FAILED'
76:\t            error_message = str(e)
77:\t            raise
78:\t        except Exception as e:
79:\t            log_status = 'FAILED'
80:\t            error_message = str(e)
81:\t            self.handle_service_error(e, "Failed to sync station data")
82:\t        finally:
83:\t            # Log sync operation
84:\t            if station:
85:\t                duration_ms = int((time.time() - start_time) * 1000)
86:\t                device_data = data.get('device', {})
87:\t                IoTSyncLogService.log_sync(
88:\t                    station=station,
89:\t                    device_uuid=device_data.get('imei', device_data.get('serial_number', 'unknown')),
90:\t                    sync_type='FULL',
91:\t                    direction='INBOUND',
92:\t                    request_payload=data,
93:\t                    response_payload=result,
94:\t                    status=log_status,
95:\t                    error_message=error_message,
96:\t                    duration_ms=duration_ms
97:\t                )
98:\t    
99:\t    def _sync_station(self, device_data: Dict, station_data: Dict) -> Station:
100:\t        """Update or create Station record"""
101:\t        try:
102:\t            imei = self._resolve_station_imei(device_data)
103:\t            serial_number = device_data.get('serial_number') or imei
104:\t            
105:\t            last_heartbeat_str = device_data.get('last_heartbeat')
106:\t            last_heartbeat = None
107:\t            if last_heartbeat_str:
108:\t                try:
109:\t                    last_heartbeat = parse_datetime(last_heartbeat_str)
110:\t                except ValueError:
111:\t                    self.log_warning(f"Invalid heartbeat format: {last_heartbeat_str}")
112:\t            
113:\t            station, created = Station.objects.get_or_create(
114:\t                imei=imei,
115:\t                defaults={
116:\t                    'serial_number': serial_number,
117:\t                    'station_name': f'Station {serial_number[-4:]}',
118:\t                    'latitude': Decimal('0.0'),
119:\t                    'longitude': Decimal('0.0'),
120:\t                    'address': 'Pending Configuration',
121:\t                    'total_slots': station_data.get('total_slots', 0),
122:\t                    'status': self.STATION_STATUS_MAP.get(device_data.get('status', 'OFFLINE'), 'OFFLINE'),
123:\t                    'hardware_info': device_data.get('hardware_info', {}),
124:\t                    'last_heartbeat': last_heartbeat or timezone.now()
125:\t                }
126:\t            )
127:\t            
128:\t            if not created:
129:\t                self._update_existing_station(station, device_data, station_data, last_heartbeat)
130:\t            else:
131:\t                self.log_info(f"Created new station {serial_number} ({imei})")
132:\t            
133:\t            return station
134:\t            
135:\t        except Exception as e:
136:\t            self.log_error(f"Error syncing station {device_data.get('serial_number')}: {str(e)}")
137:\t            raise ServiceException(detail=f"Failed to sync station: {str(e)}", code="station_sync_error")
138:\t    
139:\t    def _update_existing_station(self, station: Station, device_data: Dict, station_data: Dict, last_heartbeat) -> None:
140:\t        """Update existing station with new data"""
141:\t        station.total_slots = station_data.get('total_slots', station.total_slots)
142:\t        station.status = self.STATION_STATUS_MAP.get(device_data.get('status', 'OFFLINE'), 'OFFLINE')
143:\t        station.hardware_info = device_data.get('hardware_info', {})
144:\t        station.last_heartbeat = last_heartbeat or timezone.now()
145:\t        
146:\t        if device_data.get('signal_strength'):
147:\t            signal_str = str(device_data['signal_strength'])
148:\t            try:
149:\t                if ':' in signal_str:
150:\t                    signal_value = int(signal_str.split(':')[1].strip())
151:\t                else:
152:\t                    signal_value = int(signal_str)
153:\t                station.hardware_info['signal_strength'] = signal_value
154:\t            except (ValueError, IndexError) as e:
155:\t                self.log_warning(f"Invalid signal_strength format: '{signal_str}', error: {e}")
156:\t                station.hardware_info['signal_strength'] = 0
157:\t        
158:\t        if device_data.get('wifi_ssid'):
159:\t            station.hardware_info['wifi_ssid'] = device_data['wifi_ssid']
160:\t        
161:\t        station.save()
162:\t        self.log_info(f"Updated station {station.serial_number}")
163:\t    
164:\t    def _sync_slots(self, station: Station, slots_data: list) -> int:
165:\t        """Update or create StationSlot records"""
166:\t        try:
167:\t            slots_updated = 0
168:\t            
169:\t            for slot_info in slots_data:
170:\t                slot_number = slot_info.get('slot_number')
171:\t                if not slot_number:
172:\t                    self.log_warning(f"Slot data missing slot_number: {slot_info}")
173:\t                    continue
174:\t                
175:\t                slot_status = self.SLOT_STATUS_MAP.get(slot_info.get('status', 'AVAILABLE'), 'AVAILABLE')
176:\t                battery_level = slot_info.get('battery_level', 0)
177:\t                slot_metadata = slot_info.get('slot_metadata', {})
178:\t                
179:\t                slot, created = StationSlot.objects.get_or_create(
180:\t                    station=station,
181:\t                    slot_number=slot_number,
182:\t                    defaults={'status': slot_status, 'battery_level': battery_level, 'slot_metadata': slot_metadata}
183:\t                )
184:\t                
185:\t                if not created:
186:\t                    slot.status = slot_status
187:\t                    slot.battery_level = battery_level
188:\t                    slot.slot_metadata = slot_metadata
189:\t                    slot.save()
190:\t                
191:\t                slots_updated += 1
192:\t            
193:\t            self.log_info(f"Updated {slots_updated} slots for station {station.serial_number}")
194:\t            return slots_updated
195:\t            
196:\t        except Exception as e:
197:\t            self.log_error(f"Error syncing slots for station {station.serial_number}: {str(e)}")
198:\t            raise ServiceException(detail=f"Failed to sync slots: {str(e)}", code="slots_sync_error")
199:\t    
200:\t    def _sync_powerbanks(self, station: Station, powerbanks_data: list) -> int:
201:\t        """Update or create PowerBank records"""
202:\t        try:
203:\t            powerbanks_updated = 0
204:\t            
205:\t            for pb_info in powerbanks_data:
206:\t                pb_serial = pb_info.get('serial_number')

210:\t

212:\t                battery_level = pb_info.get('battery_level', 0)
213:\t                current_slot_number = pb_info.get('current_slot')
214:\t                hardware_info = pb_info.get('hardware_info', {})
215:\t                
216:\t                current_slot = None

218:\t                    try:

222:\t

234:\t                )
235:\t

254:\t        """
255:\t        Reuse existing return-event logic for powerbanks found in full sync payload.

258:\t

261:\t
262:\t        candidate_serials = []
263:\t        for pb_info in powerbanks_data:
264:\t            pb_serial = str(pb_info.get('serial_number') or '').strip()
265:\t            slot_number = pb_info.get('current_slot')
266:\t            if pb_serial and slot_number:
267:\t                candidate_serials.append(pb_serial)
268:\t
269:\t        if not candidate_serials:
270:\t            return 0
271:\t
272:\t        active_rented_serials = set(
273:\t            Rental.objects.filter(
274:\t                status__in=['ACTIVE', 'OVERDUE'],
275:\t                power_bank__serial_number__in=candidate_serials
276:\t            ).values_list('power_bank__serial_number', flat=True)
277:\t        )
278:\t
279:\t        if not active_rented_serials:
280:\t            return 0
281:\t
282:\t        processed = 0
283:\t        already_processed = set()
284:\t
285:\t        for pb_info in powerbanks_data:
286:\t            pb_serial = str(pb_info.get('serial_number') or '').strip()
287:\t            slot_number = pb_info.get('current_slot')
288:\t
289:\t            if not pb_serial or not slot_number:
290:\t                continue
291:\t            if pb_serial not in active_rented_serials:
292:\t                continue
293:\t            if pb_serial in already_processed:
294:\t                continue
295:\t
296:\t            return_payload = {
297:\t                'device': device_data,
298:\t                'return_event': {
299:\t                    'power_bank_serial': pb_serial,
300:\t                    'slot_number': slot_number,
301:\t                    'battery_level': pb_info.get('battery_level', 0),
302:\t                }
303:\t            }
304:\t
305:\t            self.process_return_event(return_payload)
306:\t            processed += 1
307:\t            already_processed.add(pb_serial)
308:\t
309:\t        return processed
```

```text
1:\t"""
2:\tRental Return Service

4:\t
5:\tHandles powerbank return with charge calculations and auto-collection.
6:\t"""
7:\tfrom __future__ import annotations
8:\t
9:\tfrom decimal import Decimal
10:\t
11:\tfrom django.db import transaction
12:\tfrom django.utils import timezone
13:\t
14:\tfrom api.user.rentals.models import Rental
15:\tfrom api.user.stations.models import Station
16:\t
17:\t
18:\tclass RentalReturnMixin:
19:\t    """Mixin for rental return operations"""
20:\t    
21:\t    @transaction.atomic
22:\t    def return_power_bank(self, rental_id: str, return_station_sn: str,
23:\t                         return_slot_number: int, battery_level: int = 50) -> Rental:
24:\t        """Return power bank to station (Internal use - triggered by hardware)"""
25:\t        try:
26:\t            rental = Rental.objects.select_for_update().get(id=rental_id)
27:\t            
28:\t            # Returns can come in after the system has already marked the rental OVERDUE
29:\t            if rental.status not in ['ACTIVE', 'OVERDUE']:
30:\t                self.log_warning(
31:\t                    f"Return already processed for rental {rental.rental_code} (status: {rental.status})"
32:\t                )
33:\t                return rental
34:\t            
35:\t            return_station = Station.objects.get(serial_number=return_station_sn)
36:\t            return_slot = return_station.slots.get(slot_number=return_slot_number)
37:\t            rental.ended_at = timezone.now()
38:\t            rental.return_station = return_station
39:\t            rental.is_returned_on_time = rental.ended_at <= rental.due_at
40:\t            # Rental is returned, mark as COMPLETED regardless of timing
41:\t            # Late fees tracked via overdue_amount, not status
42:\t            rental.status = 'COMPLETED'
43:\t            
44:\t            if rental.package.payment_model == 'POSTPAID':
45:\t                self._calculate_postpayment_charges(rental)
46:\t            
47:\t            # Calculate late fees for any late return (PREPAID or POSTPAID)
48:\t            if not rental.is_returned_on_time:
49:\t                self._calculate_overdue_charges(rental)
50:\t
51:\t            # Battery cycle tracking
52:\t            if rental.start_battery_level and battery_level:
53:\t                rental.return_battery_level = battery_level
54:\t
55:\t                # Check 5-minute rule
56:\t                duration = rental.ended_at - rental.started_at
57:\t                if duration.total_seconds() < 300:
58:\t                    rental.is_under_5_min = True
59:\t                    rental.hardware_issue_reported = True
60:\t
61:\t                # Update battery cycle (creates log and updates totals)
62:\t                rental.power_bank.update_battery_cycle(
63:\t                    rental.start_battery_level,
64:\t                    battery_level,
65:\t                    rental
66:\t                )
67:\t            
68:\t            rental.save(update_fields=[
69:\t                'status', 'ended_at', 'return_station', 'is_returned_on_time',
70:\t                'overdue_amount', 'payment_status', 'amount_paid',
71:\t                'return_battery_level', 'is_under_5_min', 'hardware_issue_reported'
72:\t            ])
73:\t            
74:\t            if rental.payment_status == 'PENDING':
75:\t                self._auto_collect_payment(rental)
76:\t            
77:\t            self._return_powerbank_to_station(rental, return_station, return_slot)
78:\t            self._award_completion_points(rental)
79:\t            self._send_completion_notification(rental)
80:\t            
81:\t            self.log_info(f"Power bank returned: {rental.rental_code}")
82:\t            return rental
83:\t            
84:\t        except Exception as e:
85:\t            self.handle_service_error(e, "Failed to return power bank")
86:\t    
87:\t    def _calculate_postpayment_charges(self, rental: Rental) -> None:
88:\t        """Calculate charges for post-payment model"""
89:\t        if not rental.ended_at or not rental.started_at:
90:\t            return
91:\t        
92:\t        usage_duration = rental.ended_at - rental.started_at
93:\t        usage_minutes = int(usage_duration.total_seconds() / 60)
94:\t        
95:\t        package_rate_per_minute = rental.package.price / rental.package.duration_minutes
96:\t        total_cost = Decimal(str(usage_minutes)) * package_rate_per_minute
97:\t        
98:\t        rental.amount_paid = total_cost
99:\t        rental.payment_status = 'PENDING'
100:\t    
101:\t    def _calculate_overdue_charges(self, rental: Rental) -> None:
102:\t        """Calculate overdue charges for late returns"""
103:\t        if rental.is_returned_on_time or not rental.ended_at:
104:\t            return
105:\t        
106:\t        from api.common.utils.helpers import (
107:\t            calculate_overdue_minutes, calculate_late_fee_amount, get_package_rate_per_minute
108:\t        )
109:\t        
110:\t        overdue_minutes = calculate_overdue_minutes(rental)
111:\t        package_rate_per_minute = get_package_rate_per_minute(rental.package)
112:\t        rental.overdue_amount = calculate_late_fee_amount(package_rate_per_minute, overdue_minutes)
113:\t        
114:\t        if rental.overdue_amount > 0:
115:\t            rental.payment_status = 'PENDING'
116:\t    
117:\t    def _auto_collect_payment(self, rental: Rental) -> None:
118:\t        """Auto-collect pending payments (POSTPAID charges or late fees)"""
119:\t        try:
120:\t            from api.user.payments.services import (
121:\t                PaymentCalculationService,
122:\t                RentalPaymentFlowService,
123:\t                RentalPaymentService,
124:\t            )
125:\t            
126:\t            flow_service = RentalPaymentFlowService()
127:\t            required_due = flow_service.calculate_required_due(rental)
128:\t            if required_due <= 0:
129:\t                return
130:\t            
131:\t            calc_service = PaymentCalculationService()
132:\t            payment_options = calc_service.calculate_payment_options(
133:\t                user=rental.user,
134:\t                scenario='post_payment',
135:\t                rental_id=str(rental.id),
136:\t                amount=required_due,
137:\t            )
138:\t            
139:\t            if payment_options['is_sufficient']:
140:\t                payment_service = RentalPaymentService()
141:\t                try:
142:\t                    transaction = payment_service.pay_rental_due(
143:\t                        rental.user,
144:\t                        rental,
145:\t                        payment_options['payment_breakdown'],
146:\t                        required_due_override=required_due,
147:\t                    )
148:\t                    self.log_info(f"Auto-collected NPR {required_due} for rental {rental.rental_code}")
149:\t                    
150:\t                    # Update PENDING transaction if exists
151:\t                    self._update_pending_transaction(rental, transaction)
152:\t                    
153:\t                except Exception as e:
154:\t                    self.log_warning(f"Auto-collection failed for {rental.rental_code}: {str(e)}")
155:\t                    self._notify_payment_failed(rental, required_due)
156:\t            else:
157:\t                self.log_info(f"Insufficient balance for auto-collection: {rental.rental_code}")
158:\t                self._notify_payment_required(rental, required_due, payment_options['shortfall'])
159:\t                
160:\t        except Exception as e:
161:\t            self.log_error(f"Auto-collection error for {rental.rental_code}: {str(e)}")
162:\t            fallback_due = (rental.overdue_amount if rental.package.payment_model == 'PREPAID'
163:\t                            else rental.amount_paid + rental.overdue_amount)
164:\t            self._notify_payment_required(rental, fallback_due, Decimal('0'))
165:\t    
166:\t    def _return_powerbank_to_station(self, rental, return_station, return_slot) -> None:
167:\t        """Return power bank to station"""
168:\t        from api.user.stations.services import PowerBankService
169:\t        powerbank_service = PowerBankService()
170:\t        powerbank_service.return_power_bank(
171:\t            rental.power_bank, return_station, return_slot, rental=rental
172:\t        )
173:\t    
174:\t    def _update_pending_transaction(self, rental: Rental, payment_transaction) -> None:
175:\t        """Update PENDING transaction to SUCCESS if exists"""
176:\t        pending_transaction_id = rental.rental_metadata.get('pending_transaction_id')
177:\t        if not pending_transaction_id:
178:\t            return
179:\t        
180:\t        try:
181:\t            from api.user.payments.models import Transaction
182:\t            pending_tx = Transaction.objects.get(
183:\t                id=pending_transaction_id,
184:\t                status='PENDING'
185:\t            )
186:\t            pending_tx.status = 'SUCCESS'
187:\t            pending_tx.amount = payment_transaction.amount
188:\t            pending_tx.payment_method_type = payment_transaction.payment_method_type
189:\t            pending_tx.save(update_fields=['status', 'amount', 'payment_method_type'])
190:\t            
191:\t            self.log_info(
192:\t                f"Updated PENDING transaction {pending_tx.transaction_id} to SUCCESS"
193:\t            )
194:\t        except Exception as e:
195:\t            self.log_warning(
196:\t                f"Failed to update PENDING transaction for rental {rental.rental_code}: {str(e)}"
197:\t            )
198:\t    
199:\t    def _award_completion_points(self, rental: Rental) -> None:
200:\t        """Award points for rental completion"""

202:\t        from api.user.system.services import AppConfigService

206:\t

217:\t            
218:\t            award_points(
```

```text
1:\t"""
2:\tBase mixin with shared constants and validation helpers
3:\t"""
4:\tfrom __future__ import annotations
5:\t
6:\tfrom typing import Dict, Any
7:\tfrom api.common.services.base import ServiceException
8:\t
9:\t
10:\tclass StationSyncBaseMixin:
11:\t    """Base mixin with status mappings and validation helpers"""
12:\t    
13:\t    # Status mapping from IoT system to Django models
14:\t    SLOT_STATUS_MAP = {
15:\t        'AVAILABLE': 'AVAILABLE',
16:\t        'OCCUPIED': 'OCCUPIED',
17:\t        'ERROR': 'ERROR',
18:\t        'MAINTENANCE': 'MAINTENANCE'
19:\t    }
20:\t    
21:\t    POWERBANK_STATUS_MAP = {
22:\t        'AVAILABLE': 'AVAILABLE',
23:\t        'RENTED': 'RENTED',
24:\t        'MAINTENANCE': 'MAINTENANCE',
25:\t        'DAMAGED': 'DAMAGED'
26:\t    }
27:\t    
28:\t    STATION_STATUS_MAP = {
29:\t        'ONLINE': 'ONLINE',
30:\t        'OFFLINE': 'OFFLINE',
31:\t        'MAINTENANCE': 'MAINTENANCE'
32:\t    }
33:\t
34:\t    def _resolve_station_imei(self, device_data: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:
35:\t        """
36:\t        Canonical station identifier for sync operations.
37:\t        IoT payload should provide IMEI; fallback to serial_number only if needed.
38:\t        """
39:\t        imei = str(device_data.get('imei') or device_data.get('serial_number') or '').strip()
40:\t        if not imei:
41:\t            raise ServiceException(
42:\t                detail="Missing device identifier (imei or serial_number)",
43:\t                code="missing_device_identifier"
44:\t            )
45:\t        return imei
46:\t
47:\t    def _validate_sync_data(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
48:\t        """Validate sync data structure"""
49:\t        if not isinstance(data, dict):
50:\t            raise ServiceException(detail="Data must be a dictionary", code="invalid_data_format")
51:\t
52:\t        device_data = data.get('device', {})
53:\t        self._resolve_station_imei(device_data)
54:\t
55:\t        slots_data = data.get('slots', [])
56:\t        if slots_data and not isinstance(slots_data, list):
57:\t            raise ServiceException(detail="Slots data must be a list", code="invalid_slots_format")
58:\t        
59:\t        powerbanks_data = data.get('power_banks', [])
60:\t        if powerbanks_data and not isinstance(powerbanks_data, list):
61:\t            raise ServiceException(detail="PowerBanks data must be a list", code="invalid_powerbanks_format")
62:\t    
63:\t    def _validate_return_data(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
64:\t        """Validate return event data structure"""
65:\t        device_data = data.get('device', {})
66:\t        self._resolve_station_imei(device_data)
67:\t        return_event = data.get('return_event', {})
68:\t
69:\t        required_fields = {
70:\t            'return_event.power_bank_serial': return_event.get('power_bank_serial'),
71:\t            'return_event.slot_number': return_event.get('slot_number')
72:\t        }
73:\t        
74:\t        missing_fields = [field for field, value in required_fields.items() if not value]
75:\t        if missing_fields:
76:\t            raise ServiceException(
77:\t                detail=f"Missing required fields: {', '.join(missing_fields)}",
78:\t                code="missing_return_fields"
79:\t            )
80:\t    
81:\t    def _validate_status_data(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> None:
82:\t        """Validate status update data structure"""
83:\t        if not isinstance(data, dict):
84:\t            raise ServiceException(detail="Data must be a dictionary", code="invalid_data_format")
85:\t
86:\t        device_data = data.get('device', {})
87:\t        self._resolve_station_imei(device_data)
88:\t
89:\t        if not device_data.get('status'):
90:\t            raise ServiceException(detail="Missing device status", code="missing_status")
```

```text
1:\t"""
2:\tStatus update mixin - handles station status changes
3:\t"""
4:\tfrom __future__ import annotations
5:\t
6:\tfrom typing import Dict, Any
7:\timport time
8:\tfrom django.utils import timezone
9:\tfrom django.db import transaction
10:\t
11:\tfrom api.common.services.base import ServiceException
12:\tfrom api.user.stations.models import Station
13:\tfrom api.internal.services.iot_sync_log_service import IoTSyncLogService
14:\t
15:\t
16:\tclass StatusUpdateMixin:
17:\t    """Mixin for processing station status updates"""
18:\t    
19:\t    @transaction.atomic
20:\t    def update_station_status(self, data: Dict[str, Any]) -> Dict[str, Any]:
21:\t        """
22:\t        Update station status (online/offline/maintenance)
23:\t        
24:\t        Args:
25:\t            data: Status update payload from IoT system
26:\t            
27:\t        Returns:
28:\t            Summary of status update
29:\t        """
30:\t        start_time = time.time()
31:\t        station = None
32:\t        log_status = 'SUCCESS'
33:\t        error_message = None
34:\t        result = {}
35:\t        
36:\t        try:
37:\t            self._validate_status_data(data)
38:\t            
39:\t            device_data = data.get('device', {})
40:\t            station_imei = self._resolve_station_imei(device_data)
41:\t            new_status = device_data.get('status')
42:\t
43:\t            station = Station.objects.filter(imei=station_imei).first()
44:\t            
45:\t            if not station:
46:\t                raise ServiceException(
47:\t                    detail=f"Station with imei {station_imei} not found",
48:\t                    code="station_not_found"
49:\t                )
50:\t            
51:\t            # Validate status value
52:\t            if new_status not in self.STATION_STATUS_MAP:
53:\t                raise ServiceException(
54:\t                    detail=f"Invalid status '{new_status}'. Must be one of: {', '.join(self.STATION_STATUS_MAP.keys())}",
55:\t                    code="invalid_status"
56:\t                )
57:\t            
58:\t            # Track status change BEFORE updating
59:\t            mapped_status = self.STATION_STATUS_MAP.get(new_status, 'OFFLINE')
60:\t            history = IoTSyncLogService.track_status_change(station, mapped_status, 'SYNC')
61:\t            
62:\t            # Update heartbeat and hardware info
63:\t            station.last_heartbeat = timezone.now()
64:\t            if device_data.get('hardware_info'):
65:\t                station.hardware_info.update(device_data['hardware_info'])
66:\t            station.save(update_fields=['last_heartbeat', 'hardware_info', 'updated_at'])
67:\t            
68:\t            result = {
69:\t                'station_id': str(station.id),
70:\t                'serial_number': station.serial_number,
71:\t                'status': station.status,
72:\t                'status_changed': history is not None,
73:\t                'last_heartbeat': station.last_heartbeat.isoformat(),
74:\t                'updated_at': timezone.now().isoformat()
75:\t            }
76:\t            
77:\t            self.log_info(f"Station {station_imei} status updated to {station.status}")
78:\t            return result
79:\t        
80:\t        except ServiceException as e:
81:\t            log_status = 'FAILED'
82:\t            error_message = str(e)
83:\t            raise
84:\t        except Exception as e:
85:\t            log_status = 'FAILED'
86:\t            error_message = str(e)
87:\t            identifier = data.get('device', {}).get('imei') or data.get('device', {}).get('serial_number', 'unknown')
88:\t            self.handle_service_error(e, f"Failed to update station status for {identifier}")
89:\t        finally:
90:\t            # Log sync operation
91:\t            if station:
92:\t                duration_ms = int((time.time() - start_time) * 1000)
93:\t                device_data = data.get('device', {})
94:\t                IoTSyncLogService.log_sync(
95:\t                    station=station,
96:\t                    device_uuid=device_data.get('imei', device_data.get('serial_number', 'unknown')),
97:\t                    sync_type='STATUS',
98:\t                    direction='INBOUND',
99:\t                    request_payload=data,
100:\t                    response_payload=result,
101:\t                    status=log_status,
102:\t                    error_message=error_message,
103:\t                    duration_ms=duration_ms
104:\t                )
```

```text
1:\t"""
2:\tInternal API views for IoT system integration
3:\tEndpoints for receiving device data from Java IoT management system
4:\t"""
5:\tfrom __future__ import annotations
6:\t
7:\timport logging
8:\tfrom rest_framework.views import APIView
9:\tfrom rest_framework.response import Response
10:\tfrom rest_framework import status
11:\tfrom api.user.auth.permissions import IsStaffPermission
12:\tfrom django.db import transaction
13:\tfrom drf_spectacular.utils import extend_schema
14:\t
15:\tfrom api.common.mixins import BaseAPIView
16:\tfrom api.common.decorators import log_api_call
17:\tfrom api.internal.services import StationSyncService
18:\tfrom api.common.utils.signature import get_signature_util
19:\tfrom api.common.services.base import ServiceException
20:\t
21:\tlogger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
22:\t
23:\t
24:\tclass StationDataInternalView(APIView, BaseAPIView):
25:\t    """
26:\t    Internal endpoint for receiving station data from IoT system
27:\t    
28:\t    POST /api/internal/stations/data
29:\t    
30:\t    Handles three types of data:
31:\t    - type=full: Complete station synchronization (device upload)
32:\t    - type=returned: PowerBank return event notification
33:\t    - type=status: Device status change (online/offline)
34:\t    """
35:\t    
36:\t    permission_classes = [IsStaffPermission]
37:\t    
38:\t    @extend_schema(
39:\t        operation_id="internal_station_data_sync",
40:\t        tags=["Internal - IoT Integration"],
41:\t        summary="Sync Station Data from IoT System",
42:\t        description="Internal endpoint for receiving station data from Java IoT management system.",
43:\t        request={
44:\t            'application/json': {
45:\t                'type': 'object',
46:\t                'properties': {
47:\t                    'type': {'type': 'string', 'enum': ['full', 'returned', 'status']},
48:\t                    'timestamp': {'type': 'integer'},
49:\t                    'device': {'type': 'object'},
50:\t                    'station': {'type': 'object'},
51:\t                    'slots': {'type': 'array'},
52:\t                    'power_banks': {'type': 'array'}
53:\t                },
54:\t                'required': ['type', 'timestamp', 'device']
55:\t            }
56:\t        },
57:\t        responses={200: {'type': 'object'}, 400: {'type': 'object'}, 403: {'type': 'object'}}
58:\t    )
59:\t    @log_api_call()
60:\t    def post(self, request):
61:\t        """Process incoming station data from IoT system"""
62:\t        def operation():
63:\t            self._validate_request_signature(request)
64:\t            
65:\t            data = request.data
66:\t            data_type = data.get('type')
67:\t            
68:\t            logger.info(f"Received IoT data sync request: type={data_type}")
69:\t            
70:\t            if data_type == 'full':
71:\t                return self._handle_full_sync(data)
72:\t            elif data_type == 'returned':
73:\t                return self._handle_return_event(data)
74:\t            elif data_type == 'status':
75:\t                return self._handle_status(data)
76:\t            else:
77:\t                raise ServiceException(
78:\t                    detail=f'Invalid data type: {data_type}. Must be "full", "returned", or "status"',
79:\t                    code="invalid_type"
80:\t                )
81:\t        
82:\t        return self.handle_service_operation(
83:\t            operation,
84:\t            success_message="IoT data processed successfully",
85:\t            error_message="Failed to process IoT data"
86:\t        )
87:\t    
88:\t    def _validate_request_signature(self, request):
89:\t        """Validate HMAC signature from IoT system"""
90:\t        signature = request.META.get('HTTP_X_SIGNATURE')
91:\t        timestamp_str = request.META.get('HTTP_X_TIMESTAMP')
92:\t        
93:\t        if not signature or not timestamp_str:
94:\t            raise ServiceException(
95:\t                detail='Missing signature or timestamp headers (X-Signature, X-Timestamp)',
96:\t                code="missing_headers"
97:\t            )
98:\t        
99:\t        try:
100:\t            timestamp = int(timestamp_str)
101:\t        except ValueError:
102:\t            raise ServiceException(detail='Invalid timestamp format', code="invalid_timestamp")
103:\t        
104:\t        try:
105:\t            if request.content_type == 'application/json':
106:\t                payload = request.body.decode('utf-8')
107:\t            else:
108:\t                raise ServiceException(detail='Content-Type must be application/json', code="invalid_content_type")
109:\t        except Exception as e:
110:\t            raise ServiceException(detail=f'Error reading request body: {str(e)}', code="body_read_error")
111:\t        
112:\t        signature_util = get_signature_util()
113:\t        is_valid, error_message = signature_util.validate_signature(
114:\t            payload=payload, timestamp=timestamp, received_signature=signature
115:\t        )
116:\t        
117:\t        if not is_valid:
118:\t            raise ServiceException(detail=f'Signature validation failed: {error_message}', code="invalid_signature")
119:\t
120:\t    def _handle_full_sync(self, data):
121:\t        """Handle full station synchronization"""
122:\t        try:
123:\t            service = StationSyncService()
124:\t            with transaction.atomic():
125:\t                result = service.sync_station_data(data)
126:\t            logger.info(f"Station sync successful: {result}")
127:\t            return result
128:\t        except ServiceException:
129:\t            raise
130:\t        except Exception as e:
131:\t            logger.error(f"Error in full sync: {str(e)}", exc_info=True)
132:\t            raise ServiceException(detail=f'Sync failed: {str(e)}', code="sync_error")
133:\t    
134:\t    def _handle_return_event(self, data):
135:\t        """Handle PowerBank return event notification"""
136:\t        try:
137:\t            service = StationSyncService()
138:\t            with transaction.atomic():
139:\t                result = service.process_return_event(data)
140:\t            logger.info(f"Return event processed: {result}")
141:\t            return result
142:\t        except ServiceException:
143:\t            raise
144:\t        except Exception as e:
145:\t            logger.error(f"Error processing return: {str(e)}", exc_info=True)
146:\t            raise ServiceException(detail=f'Return processing failed: {str(e)}', code="return_error")
147:\t    
148:\t    def _handle_status(self, data):
149:\t        """Handle device status change (online/offline/maintenance)"""
150:\t        try:
151:\t            service = StationSyncService()
152:\t            with transaction.atomic():
153:\t                result = service.update_station_status(data)
154:\t            logger.info(f"Status update processed: {result}")
155:\t            return result
156:\t        except ServiceException:
157:\t            raise
158:\t        except Exception as e:
159:\t            logger.error(f"Error processing status update: {str(e)}", exc_info=True)
160:\t            raise ServiceException(detail=f'Status update failed: {str(e)}', code="status_update_error")

```

```json
{"command":"$script = @'\nfrom datetime import timedelta\nfrom decimal import Decimal\nimport json\nimport os\nfrom django.utils import timezone\nfrom django.contrib.auth import get_user_model\nfrom api.user.stations.models import Station, StationSlot, PowerBank\nfrom api.user.rentals.models import Rental, RentalPackage\n\nUser = get_user_model()\nuser = User.objects.filter(is_staff=True).order_by('id').first() or User.objects.order_by('id').first()\nif not user:\n    raise SystemExit('No user found to seed rental test')\n\npkg = RentalPackage.objects.filter(is_active=True).order_by('id').first()\nif not pkg:\n    pkg = RentalPackage.objects.create(\n        name='Temp Package',\n        description='Temp package for sync test',\n        duration_minutes=60,\n        price=Decimal('100.00'),\n        package_type='HOURLY',\n        payment_model='POSTPAID',\n        is_active=True,\n        package_metadata={}\n    )\n\nsuffix = timezone.now().strftime('%m%d%H%M%S')\nstation_sn = f'OFFSYNC3-SN-{suffix}'\nstation_imei = f'OFFSYNC3-IMEI-{suffix}'\npb_serial = f'OFF3PB{suffix}'\nrental_code = f'F{suffix[-9:]}'\n\nstation = Station.objects.create(\n    station_name=f'Offline Sync3 Test {suffix}',\n    serial_number=station_sn,\n    imei=station_imei,\n    latitude=Decimal('27.717200000000000'),\n    longitude=Decimal('85.324000000000000'),\n    address='Kathmandu Test Address',\n    total_slots=2,\n    status='ONLINE',\n    hardware_info={}\n)\n\nslot1 = StationSlot.objects.create(\n    station=station,\n    slot_number=1,\n    status='OCCUPIED',\n    battery_level=35,\n    slot_metadata={}\n)\nslot2 = StationSlot.objects.create(\n    station=station,\n    slot_number=2,\n    status='AVAILABLE',\n    battery_level=0,\n    slot_metadata={}\n)\n\npb = PowerBank.objects.create(\n    serial_number=pb_serial,\n    model='Standard',\n    capacity_mah=10000,\n    status='RENTED',\n    battery_level=35,\n    hardware_info={},\n    current_station=station,\n    current_slot=slot1\n)\n\nnow = timezone.now()\nrental = Rental.objects.create(\n    user=user,\n    station=station,\n    slot=slot1,\n    package=pkg,\n    power_bank=pb,\n    rental_code=rental_code,\n    status='ACTIVE',\n    payment_status='PENDING',\n    started_at=now - timedelta(minutes=20),\n    due_at=now + timedelta(minutes=40),\n    amount_paid=Decimal('0.00'),\n    overdue_amount=Decimal('0.00'),\n    start_battery_level=35,\n)\nslot1.current_rental = rental\nslot1.save(update_fields=['current_rental', 'updated_at'])\n\npayload = {\n    'type': 'full',\n    'timestamp': int(now.timestamp()),\n    'device': {\n        'imei': station.imei,\n        'serial_number': station.serial_number,\n        'status': 'ONLINE',\n        'last_heartbeat': now.isoformat(),\n        'hardware_info': {'firmware_version': 'sync-test-1.0'}\n    },\n    'station': {'total_slots': 2},\n    'slots': [\n        {'slot_number': 1, 'status': 'AVAILABLE', 'battery_level': 0, 'slot_metadata': {}},\n        {'slot_number': 2, 'status': 'OCCUPIED', 'battery_level': 82, 'slot_metadata': {}},\n    ],\n    'power_banks': [\n        {\n            'serial_number': pb.serial_number,\n            'status': 'AVAILABLE',\n            'battery_level': 82,\n            'current_slot': 2,\n            'hardware_info': {}\n        }\n    ]\n}\n\nos.makedirs('/application/tmp_sync_tests', exist_ok=True)\npayload_path = '/application/tmp_sync_tests/offline_full_sync_payload.json'\nwith open(payload_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n    json.dump(payload, f, separators=(',', ':'), ensure_ascii=True)\n\nctx = {\n    'station_id': str(station.id),\n    'station_sn': station.serial_number,\n    'station_imei': station.imei,\n    'slot1_id': str(slot1.id),\n    'slot2_id': str(slot2.id),\n    'powerbank_id': str(pb.id),\n    'powerbank_serial': pb.serial_number,\n    'rental_id': str(rental.id),\n    'rental_code': rental.rental_code,\n    'payload_file': payload_path,\n}\nctx_path = '/application/tmp_sync_tests/offline_full_sync_context.json'\nwith open(ctx_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n    json.dump(ctx, f, separators=(',', ':'), ensure_ascii=True)\n\nprint(json.dumps(ctx, separators=(',', ':'), ensure_ascii=True))\n'@;\n$script | docker exec -i cg-api-local sh -lc \"cd /application && uv run manage.py shell\"","workdir":"e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend\\UserBackend","timeout_ms":120000}
```

```json
{"command":"$ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'\n\n# 1) Admin login (Task.md style)\n$login = curl.exe -s -X POST \"http://localhost:8010/api/admin/login\" `\n  -H \"accept: application/json\" `\n  -H \"Content-Type: multipart/form-data\" `\n  -F \"email=janak@powerbank.com\" `\n  -F \"password=5060\"\n$loginObj = $login | ConvertFrom-Json\nif (-not $loginObj.success) { throw \"Admin login failed: $login\" }\n$token = $loginObj.data.access_token\n\n# 2) Load seeded context\n$ctxPath = \"e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend\\UserBackend\\tmp_sync_tests\\offline_full_sync_context.json\"\n$ctx = Get-Content -Raw $ctxPath | ConvertFrom-Json\n$rentalId = $ctx.rental_id\n\n# 3) Build signature from exact payload bytes\n$sigOut = docker exec cg-api-local sh -lc \"cd /application && uv run manage.py shell -c \\\"from api.common.utils.signature import get_signature_util; import time, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/application/tmp_sync_tests/offline_full_sync_payload.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); ts=int(time.time()); print(ts); print(get_signature_util().generate_signature(p, ts))\\\"\"\n$sigLines = ($sigOut -split \"`r?`n\") | Where-Object { $_ -and $_ -notmatch \"objects imported automatically\" }\n$timestamp = $sigLines[0].Trim()\n$signature = $sigLines[1].Trim()\n\n$payloadFile = \"e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend\\UserBackend\\tmp_sync_tests\\offline_full_sync_payload.json\"\n\n# 4) First full sync call (expected to auto-complete active rental)\n$sync1 = curl.exe -s -X POST \"http://localhost:8010/api/internal/stations/data\" `\n  -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\" `\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" `\n  -H \"X-Timestamp: $timestamp\" `\n  -H \"X-Signature: $signature\" `\n  --data-binary \"@$payloadFile\"\n\n# 5) Check rental detail after sync\n$detail1 = curl.exe -s -X GET \"http://localhost:8010/api/admin/rentals/$rentalId\" `\n  -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\" `\n  -H \"accept: application/json\"\n\n# 6) Run same sync again for idempotency\n$sigOut2 = docker exec cg-api-local sh -lc \"cd /application && uv run manage.py shell -c \\\"from api.common.utils.signature import get_signature_util; import time, pathlib; p=pathlib.Path('/application/tmp_sync_tests/offline_full_sync_payload.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); ts=int(time.time()); print(ts); print(get_signature_util().generate_signature(p, ts))\\\"\"\n$sigLines2 = ($sigOut2 -split \"`r?`n\") | Where-Object { $_ -and $_ -notmatch \"objects imported automatically\" }\n$timestamp2 = $sigLines2[0].Trim()\n$signature2 = $sigLines2[1].Trim()\n\n$sync2 = curl.exe -s -X POST \"http://localhost:8010/api/internal/stations/data\" `\n  -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\" `\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" `\n  -H \"X-Timestamp: $timestamp2\" `\n  -H \"X-Signature: $signature2\" `\n  --data-binary \"@$payloadFile\"\n\n$detail2 = curl.exe -s -X GET \"http://localhost:8010/api/admin/rentals/$rentalId\" `\n  -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\" `\n  -H \"accept: application/json\"\n\n# 7) Print concise JSON summary\n$summary = [ordered]@{\n  rental_id = $rentalId\n  station_sn = $ctx.station_sn\n  powerbank_serial = $ctx.powerbank_serial\n  sync_first = ($sync1 | ConvertFrom-Json)\n  rental_after_first = ($detail1 | ConvertFrom-Json)\n  sync_second = ($sync2 | ConvertFrom-Json)\n  rental_after_second = ($detail2 | ConvertFrom-Json)\n}\n$summary | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 20","workdir":"e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend","timeout_ms":180000}
```

```json
{"command":"$scriptPath = \"e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend\\UserBackend\\tmp_sync_tests\\run_offline_sync_test.ps1\"\n$script = @'\n$ErrorActionPreference = \"Stop\"\n\n$base = \"http://localhost:8010/api\"\n$ctxPath = \"e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend\\UserBackend\\tmp_sync_tests\\offline_full_sync_context.json\"\n$payloadFile = \"e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend\\UserBackend\\tmp_sync_tests\\offline_full_sync_payload.json\"\n$envFile = \"e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend\\UserBackend\\.env\"\n\n# Admin login (Task.md style)\n$loginRaw = curl.exe -s -X POST \"$base/admin/login\" `\n  -H \"accept: application/json\" `\n  -H \"Content-Type: multipart/form-data\" `\n  -F \"email=janak@powerbank.com\" `\n  -F \"password=5060\"\n$login = $loginRaw | ConvertFrom-Json\nif (-not $login.success) { throw \"Admin login failed: $loginRaw\" }\n$token = $login.data.access_token\n\n$ctx = Get-Content -Raw $ctxPath | ConvertFrom-Json\n$rentalId = $ctx.rental_id\n\n$secretLine = (Get-Content $envFile | Where-Object { $_ -like \"IOT_SYSTEM_SIGNATURE_SECRET=*\" } | Select-Object -First 1)\nif (-not $secretLine) { throw \"IOT_SYSTEM_SIGNATURE_SECRET not found in .env\" }\n$secret = $secretLine.Split(\"=\",2)[1]\n\nfunction New-Signature([string]$Secret, [string]$PayloadPath) {\n  $py = @'\nimport os,time,hmac,hashlib,json,pathlib\nsecret = os.environ[\"IOT_SECRET\"]\npayload = pathlib.Path(os.environ[\"PAYLOAD_PATH\"]).read_text(encoding=\"utf-8\")\nts = int(time.time())\nmsg = f\"{ts}.{payload}\".encode(\"utf-8\")\nsig = hmac.new(secret.encode(\"utf-8\"), msg, hashlib.sha256).hexdigest()\nprint(json.dumps({\"timestamp\": ts, \"signature\": sig}, separators=(\",\", \":\")))\n'@\n  $env:IOT_SECRET = $Secret\n  $env:PAYLOAD_PATH = $PayloadPath\n  $out = $py | python -\n  return ($out | ConvertFrom-Json)\n}\n\n$sign1 = New-Signature -Secret $secret -PayloadPath $payloadFile\n$sync1Raw = curl.exe -s -X POST \"$base/internal/stations/data\" `\n  -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\" `\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" `\n  -H \"X-Timestamp: $($sign1.timestamp)\" `\n  -H \"X-Signature: $($sign1.signature)\" `\n  --data-binary \"@$payloadFile\"\n$sync1 = $sync1Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\n\n$detail1Raw = curl.exe -s -X GET \"$base/admin/rentals/$rentalId\" `\n  -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\" `\n  -H \"accept: application/json\"\n$detail1 = $detail1Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\n\nStart-Sleep -Seconds 1\n$sign2 = New-Signature -Secret $secret -PayloadPath $payloadFile\n$sync2Raw = curl.exe -s -X POST \"$base/internal/stations/data\" `\n  -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\" `\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" `\n  -H \"X-Timestamp: $($sign2.timestamp)\" `\n  -H \"X-Signature: $($sign2.signature)\" `\n  --data-binary \"@$payloadFile\"\n$sync2 = $sync2Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\n\n$detail2Raw = curl.exe -s -X GET \"$base/admin/rentals/$rentalId\" `\n  -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\" `\n  -H \"accept: application/json\"\n$detail2 = $detail2Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\n\n$result = [ordered]@{\n  station_sn = $ctx.station_sn\n  station_imei = $ctx.station_imei\n  powerbank_serial = $ctx.powerbank_serial\n  rental_id = $rentalId\n  sync_first = $sync1\n  rental_after_first = $detail1\n  sync_second = $sync2\n  rental_after_second = $detail2\n}\n$result | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 30\n'@\nSet-Content -Path $scriptPath -Value $script -Encoding UTF8\npwsh -NoProfile -File $scriptPath","workdir":"e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend","timeout_ms":240000}
```

```text
1:\t"""
2:\tSignature generation and validation for IoT system integration
3:\tUses HMAC-SHA256 algorithm matching Java implementation
4:\t"""
5:\tfrom __future__ import annotations
6:\t
7:\timport hmac
8:\timport hashlib
9:\timport base64
10:\timport time
11:\tfrom typing import Tuple
12:\tfrom django.conf import settings
13:\t
14:\tfrom api.common.services.base import BaseService
15:\t
16:\t
17:\tclass SignChargeGharMain(BaseService):
18:\t    """HMAC-SHA256 signature utilities for ChargeGhar IoT integration"""
19:\t    
20:\t    def __init__(self, secret_key: str = None):
21:\t        """
22:\t        Initialize with secret key
23:\t        
24:\t        Args:
25:\t            secret_key: Shared secret for HMAC. If None, uses Django settings
26:\t        """
27:\t        super().__init__()
28:\t        self.secret_key = secret_key or getattr(settings, 'IOT_SYSTEM_SIGNATURE_SECRET', None)
29:\t        
30:\t        if not self.secret_key:
31:\t            raise ValueError("IOT_SYSTEM_SIGNATURE_SECRET not configured in settings")
32:\t    
33:\t    def generate_signature(self, payload: str, timestamp: int) -> str:
34:\t        """
35:\t        Generate HMAC-SHA256 signature for request
36:\t        
37:\t        Args:
38:\t            payload: JSON request body as string
39:\t            timestamp: Unix timestamp in seconds
40:\t            
41:\t        Returns:
42:\t            Base64 encoded signature string
43:\t        """
44:\t        try:
45:\t            if not payload:
46:\t                raise ValueError("Payload cannot be empty")
47:\t            
48:\t            if not isinstance(timestamp, int) or timestamp <= 0:
49:\t                raise ValueError("Timestamp must be a positive integer")
50:\t            
51:\t            message = f"{payload}{timestamp}"
52:\t            
53:\t            signature = hmac.new(
54:\t                key=self.secret_key.encode('utf-8'),
55:\t                msg=message.encode('utf-8'),
56:\t                digestmod=hashlib.sha256
57:\t            ).digest()
58:\t            
59:\t            encoded_signature = base64.b64encode(signature).decode('utf-8')
60:\t            
61:\t            self.log_info(f"Generated signature for payload length: {len(payload)}, timestamp: {timestamp}")
62:\t            return encoded_signature
63:\t            
64:\t        except Exception as e:
65:\t            self.log_error(f"Error generating signature: {str(e)}")
66:\t            raise ValueError(f"Signature generation failed: {str(e)}")
67:\t    
68:\t    def validate_signature(
69:\t        self, 
70:\t        payload: str, 
71:\t        timestamp: int, 
72:\t        received_signature: str,
73:\t        time_tolerance: int = 300
74:\t    ) -> Tuple[bool, str]:
75:\t        """
76:\t        Validate signature from request
77:\t        
78:\t        Args:
79:\t            payload: JSON request body as string
80:\t            timestamp: Timestamp from request header
81:\t            received_signature: Signature from X-Signature header
82:\t            time_tolerance: Maximum age of request in seconds (default 300s = 5min)
83:\t            
84:\t        Returns:
85:\t            Tuple of (is_valid: bool, error_message: str)
86:\t        """
87:\t        try:
88:\t            if not payload:
89:\t                return False, "Payload cannot be empty"
90:\t            
91:\t            if not received_signature:
92:\t                return False, "Signature cannot be empty"
93:\t            
94:\t            if not isinstance(timestamp, int):
95:\t                return False, "Timestamp must be an integer"
96:\t            
97:\t            # Check timestamp freshness
98:\t            current_time = int(time.time())
99:\t            time_diff = abs(current_time - timestamp)
100:\t            
101:\t            if time_diff > time_tolerance:
102:\t                self.log_warning(f"Request timestamp too old: {time_diff}s > {time_tolerance}s allowed")
103:\t                return False, f"Request timestamp too old ({time_diff}s > {time_tolerance}s allowed)"
104:\t            
105:\t            # Compute expected signature
106:\t            try:
107:\t                expected_signature = self.generate_signature(payload, timestamp)
108:\t            except Exception as e:
109:\t                self.log_error(f"Error computing expected signature: {str(e)}")
110:\t                return False, f"Signature generation error: {str(e)}"
111:\t            
112:\t            # Compare signatures (timing-safe comparison)
113:\t            if not hmac.compare_digest(expected_signature, received_signature):
114:\t                self.log_warning(f"Signature mismatch for timestamp {timestamp}")
115:\t                return False, "Signature mismatch"
116:\t            
117:\t            self.log_info(f"Signature validation successful for timestamp {timestamp}")
118:\t            return True, ""
119:\t            
120:\t        except Exception as e:
121:\t            self.log_error(f"Error validating signature: {str(e)}")
122:\t            return False, f"Signature validation error: {str(e)}"
123:\t    
124:\t    @staticmethod
125:\t    def get_current_timestamp() -> int:
126:\t        """Get current Unix timestamp in seconds"""
127:\t        return int(time.time())
128:\t
129:\t
130:\t# Singleton instance
131:\t_signature_util = None
132:\t
133:\t
134:\tdef get_signature_util() -> SignChargeGharMain:
135:\t    """Get singleton signature utility instance"""
136:\t    global _signature_util
137:\t    if _signature_util is None:
138:\t        _signature_util = SignChargeGharMain()
139:\t    return _signature_util
```

```json
{"command":"$script = @'\nfrom datetime import timedelta\nfrom decimal import Decimal\nimport json, os\nfrom django.utils import timezone\nfrom django.contrib.auth import get_user_model\nfrom api.user.stations.models import Station, StationSlot, PowerBank\nfrom api.user.rentals.models import Rental, RentalPackage\n\nUser = get_user_model()\nuser = User.objects.filter(is_staff=True).order_by('id').first() or User.objects.order_by('id').first()\nif not user:\n    raise SystemExit('No user found')\n\npkg = RentalPackage.objects.filter(is_active=True).order_by('id').first()\nif not pkg:\n    pkg = RentalPackage.objects.create(\n        name='Temp Package', description='Temp package', duration_minutes=60,\n        price=Decimal('100.00'), package_type='HOURLY', payment_model='POSTPAID',\n        is_active=True, package_metadata={}\n    )\n\nsuffix = timezone.now().strftime('%m%d%H%M%S')\nstation = Station.objects.create(\n    station_name=f'Manual Force Test {suffix}',\n    serial_number=f'MANUAL-SN-{suffix}',\n    imei=f'MANUAL-IMEI-{suffix}',\n    latitude=Decimal('27.717200000000000'),\n    longitude=Decimal('85.324000000000000'),\n    address='Kathmandu Manual Test',\n    total_slots=1,\n    status='ONLINE',\n    hardware_info={}\n)\nslot1 = StationSlot.objects.create(station=station, slot_number=1, status='OCCUPIED', battery_level=44, slot_metadata={})\npb = PowerBank.objects.create(\n    serial_number=f'MANPB{suffix}',\n    model='Standard', capacity_mah=10000,\n    status='RENTED', battery_level=44,\n    current_station=station, current_slot=slot1,\n    hardware_info={}\n)\nnow = timezone.now()\nrental = Rental.objects.create(\n    user=user,\n    station=station,\n    slot=slot1,\n    package=pkg,\n    power_bank=pb,\n    rental_code=f'M{suffix[-9:]}',\n    status='ACTIVE',\n    payment_status='PENDING',\n    started_at=now - timedelta(minutes=15),\n    due_at=now + timedelta(minutes=45),\n    amount_paid=Decimal('0.00'),\n    overdue_amount=Decimal('0.00')\n)\nslot1.current_rental = rental\nslot1.save(update_fields=['current_rental', 'updated_at'])\n\nctx = {\n    'rental_id': str(rental.id),\n    'rental_code': rental.rental_code,\n    'station_sn': station.serial_number,\n    'powerbank_serial': pb.serial_number,\n}\nos.makedirs('/application/tmp_sync_tests', exist_ok=True)\nwith open('/application/tmp_sync_tests/manual_force_context.json', 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n    json.dump(ctx, f, separators=(',', ':'), ensure_ascii=True)\n\nprint(json.dumps(ctx, separators=(',', ':'), ensure_ascii=True))\n'@;\n$script | docker exec -i cg-api-local sh -lc \"cd /application && uv run manage.py shell\"","workdir":"e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend\\UserBackend","timeout_ms":120000}
```

```json
{"command":"$ErrorActionPreference='Stop'\n$base='http://localhost:8010/api'\n$ctx=Get-Content -Raw 'e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend\\UserBackend\\tmp_sync_tests\\manual_force_context.json' | ConvertFrom-Json\n$rentalId=$ctx.rental_id\n\n$loginRaw = curl.exe -s -X POST \"$base/admin/login\" -H \"accept: application/json\" -H \"Content-Type: multipart/form-data\" -F \"email=janak@powerbank.com\" -F \"password=5060\"\n$login = $loginRaw | ConvertFrom-Json\nif(-not $login.success){ throw \"Login failed: $loginRaw\" }\n$token = $login.data.access_token\n\n$payloadPath='e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend\\UserBackend\\tmp_sync_tests\\force_complete_payload.json'\nSet-Content -Path $payloadPath -Encoding UTF8 -NoNewline -Value '{\"amount\":\"123.50\",\"status\":\"COMPLETED\"}'\n\n$force1Raw = curl.exe -s -X POST \"$base/admin/rentals/$rentalId/force-complete\" `\n  -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\" `\n  -H \"accept: application/json\" `\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" `\n  --data-binary \"@$payloadPath\"\n$force1 = $force1Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\n\n$detail1Raw = curl.exe -s -X GET \"$base/admin/rentals/$rentalId\" -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\" -H \"accept: application/json\"\n$detail1 = $detail1Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\n\n$force2Raw = curl.exe -s -X POST \"$base/admin/rentals/$rentalId/force-complete\" `\n  -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\" `\n  -H \"accept: application/json\" `\n  -H \"Content-Type: application/json\" `\n  --data-binary \"@$payloadPath\"\n$force2 = $force2Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\n\n$detail2Raw = curl.exe -s -X GET \"$base/admin/rentals/$rentalId\" -H \"Authorization: Bearer $token\" -H \"accept: application/json\"\n$detail2 = $detail2Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\n\n[ordered]@{\n  rental_id=$rentalId\n  first_force=$force1\n  after_first=$detail1\n  second_force=$force2\n  after_second=$detail2\n} | ConvertTo-Json -Depth 30","workdir":"e:\\Companies\\DEVALAYA\\ChargeGhar\\StationBackend","timeout_ms":120000}
```

```text
29:\t    return NextResponse.json(response.data);

31:\t    const axiosError = error as AxiosError;
32:\t    if (axiosError.response) {
33:\t      return NextResponse.json(axiosError.response.data, {
34:\t        status: axiosError.response.status,
35:\t      });
36:\t    }
37:\t    return NextResponse.json(
38:\t      { success: false, message: "Internal server error" },
39:\t      { status: 500 },
40:\t    );
41:\t  }
42:\t}

```

```text
820:\t                </p>
821:\t              </div>
822:\t            ))}
823:\t          </div>
824:\t        </section>
825:\t      )}
826:\t    </main>
827:\t  );

830:\t/* â”€â”€â”€ Sub-components â”€â”€â”€ */
831:\t
832:\tfunction InfoRow({
833:\t  label,
834:\t  value,
835:\t  mono = false,
836:\t  breakAll = false,
837:\t  highlight = false,
838:\t  customColor,
839:\t}: {
840:\t  label: string;
841:\t  value: React.ReactNode;
842:\t  mono?: boolean;
843:\t  breakAll?: boolean;
844:\t  highlight?: boolean;
845:\t  customColor?: string;
846:\t}) {
847:\t  return (
848:\t    <div className="flex justify-between items-baseline py-1.5 gap-4">
849:\t      <label className="text-text-muted text-xs shrink-0 sm:w-[100px]">
850:\t        {label}
851:\t      </label>
852:\t      <span
853:\t        className={`text-xs sm:text-right break-words min-w-0 ${
854:\t          breakAll ? "break-all" : ""
855:\t        } ${mono ? "font-mono" : ""} ${
856:\t          customColor || highlight
857:\t            ? `font-semibold ${customColor || "text-accent-light"}`
858:\t            : "text-text-primary"
859:\t        }`}
860:\t      >
861:\t        {value}
862:\t      </span>
863:\t    </div>
864:\t  );
865:\t}
866:\t
867:\tfunction TableDivider() {
868:\t  return <div className="border-t border-border my-2 sm:my-3" />;
869:\t}
```

```text
1:\t"use client";
2:\t
3:\timport React from "react";
4:\timport { FiX } from "react-icons/fi";
5:\timport styles from "./modal.module.css";
6:\t
7:\tinterface ModalProps {
8:\t  title: string;
9:\t  isOpen: boolean;
10:\t  onClose: () => void;
11:\t  children: React.ReactNode;
12:\t  size?: "sm" | "md" | "lg";
13:\t}
14:\t
15:\tfunction Modal({ title, isOpen, onClose, children, size = "lg" }: ModalProps) {
16:\t  if (!isOpen) return null;
17:\t
18:\t  const sizeClass = size === "sm" ? styles.modalSm : size === "md" ? styles.modalMd : "";
19:\t
20:\t  return (
21:\t    <div className={styles.overlay} onClick={onClose}>
22:\t      <div 
23:\t        className={`${styles.modal} ${sizeClass}`} 
24:\t        onClick={(e) => e.stopPropagation()}
25:\t      >
26:\t        <div className={styles.header}>
27:\t          <h3>{title}</h3>
28:\t          <button onClick={onClose} className={styles.closeBtn} aria-label="Close">
29:\t            <FiX />
30:\t          </button>
31:\t        </div>
32:\t        <div className={styles.content}>{children}</div>
33:\t      </div>
34:\t    </div>
35:\t  );
36:\t}
37:\t
38:\texport default Modal;

```
